governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国，三权分立，由23个省和一个联邦首都区组成。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic with separation of powers, comprising 23 provinces and one autonomous federal capital district.

socialStructure.zh: 传统中产阶级在经济危机中严重萎缩，贫富分化加剧，工会势力强大但面临改革压力。
socialStructure.en: The traditional middle class has severely contracted amid economic crisis, wealth polarization is deepening, unions remain powerful but face reform pressure.

rulingClass.zh: 新任总统米莱代表的自由意志主义右翼力量，与传统庇隆主义精英形成对立。
rulingClass.en: The libertarian right represented by new president Milei, in confrontation with the traditional Peronist political elite.

succession.zh: 总统由全国直接选举产生，任期四年，可连任一次。米莱于2023年11月19日当选。
succession.en: The president is elected by direct national vote for a four-year term, renewable once. Milei was elected on November 19, 2023.

structure.zh: 联邦政府设行政、立法、司法三权分立。总统领导行政部门，国会分参众两院，最高法院独立运作。
structure.en: The federal government operates with executive, legislative, and judicial separation of powers. The president leads the executive, Congress has Senate and Chamber of Deputies, and the Supreme Court operates independently.

function.zh: 统管财政、产业与贸易政策，实施米莱的休克疗法经济改革。
function.en: Oversees fiscal, industrial, and trade policy, implementing Milei's shock therapy economic reforms.

function.zh: 管理武装力量、国防政策与军事采购。
function.en: Manages armed forces, defense policy, and military procurement.

name.en: Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Worship

function.zh: 负责外交关系、国际贸易谈判与领事事务。
function.en: Handles diplomatic relations, international trade negotiations, and consular affairs.

function.zh: 统管联邦警察、边境安全与国内反恐。
function.en: Oversees federal police, border security, and domestic counter-terrorism.

localAdmin.zh: 23个省各设省长与省议会，市镇层级实行地方自治，联邦制下各省享有较大自主权。
localAdmin.en: Each of 23 provinces has a governor and legislature, with municipal-level local self-governance and substantial provincial autonomy under the federal system.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以宪法为最高法律，最高法院拥有违宪审查权，民法典于2015年更新。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with the constitution as supreme law, the Supreme Court holding judicial review power, and the civil code updated in 2015.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（21%）和所得税为主要税源，出口税（大豆等农产品）为重要收入，米莱计划大幅削减税收。
taxationSystem.en: VAT (21%) and income tax are primary sources, export taxes (soybeans, agricultural products) are significant revenue, with Milei planning substantial tax cuts.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约62%），但世俗化趋势明显，福音派增长迅速
religion.en: Predominantly Roman Catholic (~62%), with strong secularization trends and rapid evangelical growth

philosophy.zh: 庇隆主义与自由意志主义交锋，民粹主义传统深厚，米莱代表的奥地利经济学派思想正在兴起。
philosophy.en: Peronism and libertarianism in confrontation, deep populist traditions, with Austrian school economics represented by Milei on the rise.

culturalAchievements.zh: 探戈文化遗产、梅西2022年世界杯夺冠振奋民族精神、文学传统（博尔赫斯、科塔萨尔）、牛肉与葡萄酒文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Tango cultural heritage, Messi's 2022 World Cup victory uplifting national spirit, literary tradition (Borges, Cortázar), beef and wine culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Spanish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 拉美第三大经济体，深陷滞胀危机，年通胀率超140%。米莱承诺电锯式削减公共开支与美元化。
gdpDescription.en: Latin America's third-largest economy, mired in stagflation with annual inflation exceeding 140%. Milei promises chainsaw spending cuts and dollarization.

mainIndustries.zh: 农牧业（大豆、牛肉、葡萄酒）、食品加工、汽车制造、锂矿开采、IT服务
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (soybeans, beef, wine), food processing, automotive manufacturing, lithium mining, IT services

tradeGoods.zh: 大豆及豆制品、牛肉、玉米、锂矿、葡萄酒、IT外包服务
tradeGoods.en: Soybeans and soy products, beef, corn, lithium, wine, IT outsourcing services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富因长期通胀严重缩水，中产阶级储蓄多以美元形式持有，贫困率超40%。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth severely eroded by chronic inflation, middle-class savings largely held in US dollars, poverty rate exceeds 40%.

tradeRoutes.zh: 南方共同市场（与巴西为最大贸易伙伴）、对华大豆出口、对欧贸易。
tradeRoutes.en: Mercosur (Brazil as largest trade partner), soybean exports to China, trade with Europe.

economicSystem.zh: 历史上国家干预色彩浓厚，米莱正推行激进自由市场改革，计划废除央行、实行美元化。
economicSystem.en: Historically heavy state intervention, Milei is pursuing radical free-market reforms, planning to abolish the central bank and dollarize the economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备极度紧张，央行净储备接近负值，多重汇率制度扭曲经济。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves extremely tight, central bank net reserves near negative, multiple exchange rate system distorts the economy.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的85%，2001年违约阴影犹存，与IMF有440亿美元贷款协议。
debtLevel.en: Public debt approximately 85% of GDP, shadow of 2001 default lingers, with $44 billion IMF loan agreement.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 米莱承诺实现财政盈余，计划裁撤多个部委、冻结公共部门招聘、削减能源补贴。
fiscalPolicy.en: Milei promises fiscal surplus, plans to eliminate multiple ministries, freeze public-sector hiring, and cut energy subsidies.

description.zh: 南美洲较大规模陆军，但装备老化严重，预算长期不足。
description.en: One of South America's larger armies, but with severely aging equipment and chronic budget shortfalls.

description.zh: 拥有驱逐舰与潜艇，2017年圣胡安号潜艇失事暴露装备问题。
description.en: Possesses destroyers and submarines, with the 2017 ARA San Juan disaster exposing equipment issues.

description.zh: 正寻求采购新型战斗机替换老旧机队，曾考虑F-16和JF-17。
description.en: Seeking new fighter jets to replace aging fleet, having considered F-16s and JF-17s.

technology.zh: 军事技术相对落后，装备以二手西方武器为主，国防工业有限但有航天卫星能力（CONAE）。
technology.en: Relatively outdated military technology, equipment primarily second-hand Western weapons, limited defense industry but has space satellite capability (CONAE).

threats.zh: 无直接军事威胁，主权争议聚焦马尔维纳斯群岛（福克兰群岛），南大西洋渔业纠纷。
threats.en: No direct military threats, sovereignty dispute centered on the Malvinas/Falkland Islands, South Atlantic fishing disputes.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期军事冲突。参与联合国维和行动。
recentBattles.en: No recent military conflicts. Participates in UN peacekeeping operations.

populationDescription.zh: 南美第三人口大国，欧洲移民后裔为主体，老龄化趋势渐显，人口增长缓慢。
populationDescription.en: South America's third most populous nation, predominantly of European descent, with a gradually emerging aging trend and slow population growth.

ethnicGroups.zh: 欧洲裔（约85%，以意大利裔和西班牙裔为主）、混血、原住民
ethnicGroups.en: European descent (~85%, predominantly Italian and Spanish), mestizo, indigenous

socialClasses.zh: 传统中产阶级严重萎缩，新贫困阶层扩大，少数富裕阶层与大量城市贫民形成鲜明对比。
socialClasses.en: Traditional middle class severely contracted, new poverty class expanding, stark contrast between the wealthy few and the urban poor majority.

allies.zh: 巴西（南方共同市场伙伴）、美国（米莱亲美取向）、以色列。
allies.en: Brazil (Mercosur partner), United States (Milei's pro-US orientation), Israel.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但米莱与中国、巴西左翼政府关系紧张，拒绝加入金砖国家。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but Milei has strained relations with China and Brazil's left-wing government, declined to join BRICS.

treaties.zh: 南方共同市场、联合国、OAS、G20成员。
treaties.en: Mercosur, United Nations, OAS, G20 member.

foreignPolicy.zh: 米莱推行亲美亲以外交路线，质疑对华关系，拒绝加入金砖，寻求与西方阵营靠拢。
foreignPolicy.en: Milei pursues pro-US and pro-Israel foreign policy, questions ties with China, declined BRICS membership, seeks alignment with the Western bloc.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年11月大选胜出后宣布不加入金砖，与巴西总统卢拉发生外交摩擦。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: After winning the November 2023 election, announced non-accession to BRICS and had diplomatic friction with Brazilian President Lula.

era.zh: 信息技术与数字服务时代
era.en: Information technology and digital services era

keyInnovations.zh: IT服务外包产业（Globant等）、农业生物技术、航天卫星技术（ARSAT）、核能技术。
keyInnovations.en: IT service outsourcing (Globant, etc.), agricultural biotech, space satellite technology (ARSAT), nuclear energy technology.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施老化严重，公路铁路网络庞大但维护不足，4G覆盖广泛，5G刚起步。
infrastructure.en: Infrastructure severely aging, large road and rail networks but poorly maintained, widespread 4G coverage, 5G just beginning.

policy.zh: 尚无系统性国家AI战略，米莱政府更关注经济稳定化，AI政策优先级较低。
policy.en: No systematic national AI strategy yet, the Milei government is more focused on economic stabilization, with AI policy a lower priority.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管极度宽松，米莱自由意志主义倾向意味着最少的政府干预，AI领域基本处于监管真空。
regulatoryStance.en: Extremely light regulation, Milei's libertarian leanings mean minimal government intervention, with the AI sector essentially in a regulatory vacuum.

investmentScale.zh: AI专项投资极少，2023年整体科技投资不足5亿美元，AI占比微小。
investmentScale.en: Very little dedicated AI investment, total tech investment under $500 million in 2023, with a tiny AI share.

keyProducts.zh: AI增强软件开发服务、数字化转型咨询
keyProducts.en: AI-augmented software development services, digital transformation consulting

headquarters.zh: 卢森堡（总部）/布宜诺斯艾利斯（运营）

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的电商推荐、Mercado Pago数字支付
keyProducts.en: AI-driven e-commerce recommendations, Mercado Pago digital payments

contribution.zh: 将Globant打造为拉美最大AI服务公司之一，纽交所上市。
contribution.en: Built Globant into one of Latin America's largest AI services companies, NYSE-listed.

researchFocus.zh: 农业AI应用、自然语言处理（西班牙语）、金融科技AI。
researchFocus.en: Agricultural AI applications, NLP (Spanish), fintech AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施有限，依赖国际云服务商（AWS、Azure），无本土大规模GPU集群。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited compute infrastructure, reliant on international cloud providers (AWS, Azure), no domestic large-scale GPU clusters.

talentPool.zh: 拥有大量软件工程人才但AI专业人才稀缺，人才外流严重，布宜诺斯艾利斯大学有基础研究能力。
talentPool.en: Large software engineering talent pool but scarce AI specialists, severe brain drain, University of Buenos Aires has basic research capability.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名50名开外，拉美地区位列巴西之后第二梯队。
globalRanking.en: Ranked outside top 50 globally in AI, second tier in Latin America behind Brazil.

outlook.zh: 经济危机制约AI发展，但IT服务业基础好，若经济稳定后AI外包服务有增长潜力。
outlook.en: Economic crisis constrains AI development, but the IT services base is strong; if the economy stabilizes, AI outsourcing services have growth potential.

strengths.zh: 丰富的农业资源、庞大的锂矿储量、强大的IT人才储备（Globant、Mercado Libre）、高识字率。
strengths.en: Rich agricultural resources, vast lithium reserves, strong IT talent pool (Globant, Mercado Libre), high literacy rate.

weaknesses.zh: 恶性通胀、沉重债务负担、政治极化、人才外流、基础设施老化、制度不稳定。
weaknesses.en: Hyperinflation, heavy debt burden, political polarization, brain drain, aging infrastructure, institutional instability.

outlook.zh: 米莱的休克疗法改革面临巨大政治阻力，短期阵痛不可避免，成败取决于能否迅速控制通胀并恢复市场信心。
outlook.en: Milei's shock therapy reforms face enormous political resistance, short-term pain is inevitable, success depends on quickly controlling inflation and restoring market confidence.

description.zh: 2023年11月，自由意志主义者米莱赢得阿根廷总统大选，承诺以电锯式改革终结数十年的经济衰退与恶性通胀。阿根廷拥有拉美领先的IT人才（Globant、Mercado Libre），但AI发展受制于经济危机与人才外流。米莱的亲美亲以外交转向标志着阿根廷地缘政治方向的重大变化。
description.en: In November 2023, libertarian Javier Milei won Argentina's presidential election, promising chainsaw reforms to end decades of economic decline and hyperinflation. Argentina has leading Latin American IT talent (Globant, Mercado Libre), but AI development is constrained by economic crisis and brain drain. Milei's pro-US, pro-Israel diplomatic shift marks a major change in Argentina's geopolitical orientation.

governmentForm.zh: 单一制总统制共和国，三权分立，由16个大区组成。
governmentForm.en: Unitary presidential republic with separation of powers, comprising 16 regions.

socialStructure.zh: 拉美最稳定中产阶级社会之一，但2019年社会抗议暴露深层不平等，养老金与教育改革为核心议题。
socialStructure.en: One of Latin America's most stable middle-class societies, but 2019 social protests exposed deep inequality, with pension and education reform as core issues.

rulingClass.zh: 左翼联盟执政，但在国会缺乏多数席位，与中右翼反对派形成微妙平衡。
rulingClass.en: Left-wing coalition in power but lacking a congressional majority, in delicate balance with the center-right opposition.

succession.zh: 总统由直接选举产生，任期四年，不可连任。
succession.en: The president is elected by direct vote for a four-year term, non-renewable.

structure.zh: 总统制政府，设内阁部长由总统任命，两院制国会（参议院与众议院）。
structure.en: Presidential government with cabinet ministers appointed by the president, bicameral Congress (Senate and Chamber of Deputies).

function.zh: 管理国家财政、税收政策与公共债务。
function.en: Manages national finances, tax policy, and public debt.

function.zh: 监管铜矿与锂矿开采，全球最大铜生产国的核心经济部门。
function.en: Oversees copper and lithium mining, a core economic sector of the world's largest copper producer.

name.zh: 科学技术知识与创新部
name.en: Ministry of Science, Technology, Knowledge and Innovation

function.zh: 2018年新设，推动科技创新政策与研究资助。
function.en: Established in 2018, promotes science and technology innovation policy and research funding.

function.zh: 管理武装力量与国家安全政策。
function.en: Manages armed forces and national security policy.

localAdmin.zh: 16个大区各设区长（由总统任命改为民选），下辖省与市，地方分权改革推进中。
localAdmin.en: Each of 16 regions has a governor (changed from presidential appointment to elected), with provinces and municipalities below, decentralization reforms ongoing.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，新宪法草案于2022年公投被否决，2023年再次公投否决保守派版本，现行1980年宪法经多次修正仍有效。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system, new constitution draft rejected in 2022 plebiscite, conservative version also rejected in 2023, current 1980 constitution remains in force with multiple amendments.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（19%）与所得税为主，铜矿特许权使用费为重要收入，博里奇推进税改以增加社会开支。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily VAT (19%) and income tax, copper royalties as significant revenue, Boric advancing tax reform to increase social spending.

religion.zh: 天主教（约55%），世俗化趋势强，无宗教人口快速增长
religion.en: Roman Catholic (~55%), strong secularization trend, non-religious population growing rapidly

philosophy.zh: 民主社会主义与新自由主义传统并存，2019年社会觉醒运动激发社会公正与平等话语。
philosophy.en: Democratic socialism and neoliberal traditions coexist, the 2019 social awakening movement catalyzed social justice and equality discourse.

culturalAchievements.zh: 诺贝尔文学奖传统（聂鲁达、米斯特拉尔）、天文观测（阿塔卡马沙漠天文台群）、葡萄酒文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Nobel literature tradition (Neruda, Mistral), astronomical observation (Atacama Desert observatory cluster), wine culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Spanish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 拉美最稳定经济体之一，以铜矿出口为支柱，锂矿储量全球最大，正从单一矿业经济向多元化转型。
gdpDescription.en: One of Latin America's most stable economies, copper exports as the pillar, world's largest lithium reserves, transitioning from a mono-mining economy to diversification.

mainIndustries.zh: 铜矿开采、锂矿、农产品出口（水果、葡萄酒、三文鱼）、金融服务、天文旅游
mainIndustries.en: Copper mining, lithium, agricultural exports (fruit, wine, salmon), financial services, astro-tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 铜及铜制品、锂、三文鱼、水果、葡萄酒、纸浆
tradeGoods.en: Copper and copper products, lithium, salmon, fruit, wine, pulp

householdWealth.zh: 拉美最高人均收入国之一，但贫富差距仍然显著，养老金制度改革是社会焦点。
householdWealth.en: One of the highest per capita income countries in Latin America, but wealth inequality remains significant, pension system reform is a social focal point.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大贸易伙伴（铜出口），与美国、欧盟、日韩均有自贸协定，全球自贸网络最广泛的国家之一。
tradeRoutes.en: China as largest trade partner (copper exports), FTAs with US, EU, Japan, Korea; one of the world's most extensive free trade networks.

economicSystem.zh: 以自由市场经济为基础，政府通过铜矿稳定基金调节经济波动，博里奇推进社会市场经济改革。
economicSystem.en: Based on free market economy, government regulates economic fluctuations through the copper stabilization fund, Boric advancing social market economy reforms.

unit.zh: 美元等值主权财富基金
unit.en: US dollar equivalent sovereign wealth fund

treasuryDescription.zh: 铜矿稳定基金与养老储备基金合计约400亿美元，为拉美最健全的财政缓冲之一。
treasuryDescription.en: Copper stabilization fund and pension reserve fund total approximately $40 billion, one of Latin America's strongest fiscal buffers.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的38%，在拉美地区处于较低水平。
debtLevel.en: Public debt approximately 38% of GDP, relatively low for the Latin American region.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政传统，结构性财政规则约束支出，博里奇推进税改以扩大社会安全网。
fiscalPolicy.en: Tradition of fiscal prudence, structural fiscal rules constrain spending, Boric advancing tax reform to expand the social safety net.

description.zh: 南美装备较先进的陆军之一，配备德制豹2主战坦克。
description.en: One of South America's better-equipped armies, with German Leopard 2 main battle tanks.

description.zh: 太平洋沿岸主要海军力量，拥有护卫舰与潜艇。
description.en: Major Pacific coast naval force with frigates and submarines.

description.zh: 装备F-16战斗机，南美最现代化空军之一。
description.en: Equipped with F-16 fighters, one of South America's most modern air forces.

technology.zh: 南美较先进军事装备水平，以西方武器系统为主（德、美），具备一定远洋海军能力。
technology.en: Relatively advanced military equipment for South America, primarily Western weapons systems (German, American), with some blue-water naval capability.

threats.zh: 无重大外部军事威胁，边境安全与跨国犯罪为主要关切。
threats.en: No major external military threats, border security and transnational crime are primary concerns.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期军事冲突。参与联合国维和行动。
recentBattles.en: No recent military conflicts. Participates in UN peacekeeping operations.

populationDescription.zh: 人口增长缓慢，老龄化加速，近年来委内瑞拉与海地移民增加引发社会讨论。
populationDescription.en: Slow population growth with accelerating aging, Venezuelan and Haitian immigration increase in recent years sparking social debate.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血与白人为主（约88%）、马普切原住民（约10%）、艾马拉人
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly mestizo and white (~88%), Mapuche indigenous (~10%), Aymara

socialClasses.zh: 中产阶级为社会主体但不平等程度较高，养老金制度差异造成退休后贫富分化。
socialClasses.en: Middle class forms the social majority but inequality is relatively high, pension system disparities create post-retirement wealth divide.

allies.zh: 美国、欧盟、太平洋联盟成员国（墨西哥、哥伦比亚、秘鲁）。
allies.en: United States, EU, Pacific Alliance members (Mexico, Colombia, Peru).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，与玻利维亚因领土与出海口争端关系紧张。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, tense relations with Bolivia over territorial and sea access disputes.

treaties.zh: 太平洋联盟、CPTPP、联合国、OAS、与中国美国欧盟等70+国有自贸协定。
treaties.en: Pacific Alliance, CPTPP, UN, OAS, FTAs with 70+ countries including China, US, and EU.

foreignPolicy.zh: 博里奇追求人权导向外交，批评委内瑞拉与尼加拉瓜独裁，同时维持务实经济外交。
foreignPolicy.en: Boric pursues human rights-oriented diplomacy, criticizes Venezuelan and Nicaraguan authoritarianism, while maintaining pragmatic economic diplomacy.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年主持APEC峰会，推进CPTPP扩展，新宪法公投失败影响国内政治格局。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Hosted the 2023 APEC summit, promoted CPTPP expansion, constitutional referendum failure impacted domestic political landscape.

era.zh: 数字化转型与绿色能源过渡期
era.en: Digital transformation and green energy transition era

keyInnovations.zh: 全球天文观测中心（ESO/ALMA）、绿色氢能开发、太阳能发电（阿塔卡马）、锂电池材料。
keyInnovations.en: Global astronomical observation center (ESO/ALMA), green hydrogen development, solar power (Atacama), lithium battery materials.

infrastructure.zh: 拉美最佳基础设施之一，公路网完善，光纤宽带普及率高，可再生能源占电力30%以上。
infrastructure.en: One of Latin America's best infrastructure, well-developed road network, high fiber-optic broadband penetration, renewables over 30% of electricity.

policy.zh: 2021年发布国家AI政策，博里奇政府推进数字化转型，科技部统筹AI研究资助。
policy.en: Released National AI Policy in 2021, Boric government advancing digital transformation, Ministry of Science coordinating AI research funding.

regulatoryStance.zh: 制定中的AI伦理指南，关注数据隐私保护（个人数据保护法修订中），监管框架温和。
regulatoryStance.en: AI ethics guidelines under development, focus on data privacy protection (personal data protection law under revision), moderate regulatory framework.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模较小，政府研究资助约1亿美元/年，私营部门投入有限。
investmentScale.en: Small AI investment scale, government research funding approximately $100 million/year, limited private sector investment.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的植物基食品研发（NotMilk、NotBurger）
keyProducts.en: AI-driven plant-based food development (NotMilk, NotBurger)

keyProducts.zh: AI优化的即时配送与杂货电商平台
keyProducts.en: AI-optimized on-demand delivery and grocery e-commerce platform

contribution.zh: 利用AI算法Giuseppe开发植物基食品，成为拉美首家AI食品科技独角兽。
contribution.en: Used AI algorithm Giuseppe to develop plant-based foods, becoming Latin America's first AI food-tech unicorn.

researchFocus.zh: 天文数据AI分析、农业与矿业AI应用、智慧城市。
researchFocus.en: Astronomical data AI analysis, agriculture and mining AI applications, smart cities.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 依赖国际云服务，智利大学等有中等规模计算集群，天文台数据处理能力较强。
computeInfrastructure.en: Relies on international cloud services, University of Chile has mid-scale compute clusters, strong observatory data processing capability.

talentPool.zh: 高等教育质量良好，智利大学与天主教大学有AI研究组，但整体规模较小。
talentPool.en: Good higher education quality, University of Chile and Catholic University have AI research groups, but overall scale is small.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约40-50位，拉美地区领先，与巴西、墨西哥并列第一梯队。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 40-50th globally in AI, leading in Latin America, in the first tier alongside Brazil and Mexico.

outlook.zh: 锂矿与铜矿为AI硬件供应链提供关键材料优势，绿色氢能+AI有独特发展潜力。
outlook.en: Lithium and copper mines provide key material advantages for AI hardware supply chains, green hydrogen + AI has unique development potential.

strengths.zh: 经济稳定性、全球最大铜/锂储量、广泛自贸网络、高教育水平、民主制度成熟。
strengths.en: Economic stability, world's largest copper/lithium reserves, extensive FTA network, high education level, mature democratic institutions.

weaknesses.zh: 市场规模小、社会不平等、制宪进程受挫、对矿业出口依赖高、AI人才规模有限。
weaknesses.en: Small market size, social inequality, setbacks in constitutional process, high dependence on mining exports, limited AI talent scale.

outlook.zh: 锂矿资源使智利在AI硬件供应链中占据战略位置，经济基本面稳健但社会改革面临挑战。
outlook.en: Lithium resources position Chile strategically in the AI hardware supply chain, economic fundamentals are sound but social reforms face challenges.

description.zh: 2023年11月，智利在博里奇总统领导下保持拉美最稳定经济体地位。全球最大铜产国和锂储量大国在AI硬件供应链中地位关键。虽然两次制宪公投均告失败，但民主制度运行稳健。NotCo等AI初创企业展现创新活力，天文大数据处理能力世界领先。
description.en: In November 2023, Chile under President Boric maintains its position as Latin America's most stable economy. As the world's largest copper producer and lithium reserve holder, it holds a key position in the AI hardware supply chain. While both constitutional referendum attempts failed, democratic institutions remain robust. AI startups like NotCo show innovative vitality, and astronomical big data processing capabilities are world-leading.

governmentForm.zh: 单一制总统制共和国，三权分立，由32个省和首都区组成。
governmentForm.en: Unitary presidential republic with separation of powers, comprising 32 departments and one capital district.

socialStructure.zh: 深层社会不平等，城乡差距巨大，和平进程后社会重建进行中，中产阶级缓慢扩大。
socialStructure.en: Deep social inequality, vast urban-rural divide, social reconstruction ongoing after peace process, middle class slowly expanding.

rulingClass.zh: 佩特罗为哥伦比亚首位左翼总统，代表社会变革力量，与传统保守精英和经济寡头形成对抗。
rulingClass.en: Petro is Colombia's first leftist president, representing forces of social change, in confrontation with traditional conservative elites and economic oligarchs.

succession.zh: 总统由直接选举产生，任期四年，不可连任。
succession.en: The president is elected by direct vote for a four-year term, non-renewable.

structure.zh: 总统制政府设内阁部长由总统任命，两院制国会（参议院与众议院），司法独立。
structure.en: Presidential government with cabinet ministers appointed by the president, bicameral Congress (Senate and Chamber of Representatives), independent judiciary.

name.en: Ministry of Finance and Public Credit

function.zh: 管理国家财政、税收与公共债务，推动佩特罗的社会支出计划。
function.en: Manages national finances, taxation, and public debt, advancing Petro's social spending agenda.

function.zh: 指挥武装力量，打击贩毒集团与反政府武装。
function.en: Commands armed forces, combating drug cartels and rebel groups.

name.en: Ministry of Information and Communications Technology

function.zh: 推进数字化转型、宽带基础设施与数字经济政策。
function.en: Advances digital transformation, broadband infrastructure, and digital economy policy.

function.zh: 管理石油、天然气与矿业资源，佩特罗推动能源转型。
function.en: Manages oil, gas, and mining resources, with Petro pushing energy transition.

localAdmin.zh: 32个省各设省长民选，下辖市镇实行地方自治，治安与基础设施在偏远地区仍面临挑战。
localAdmin.en: Each of 32 departments has an elected governor, municipalities exercise local self-governance, security and infrastructure remain challenging in remote areas.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，1991年宪法框架，宪法法院活跃行使违宪审查权，对冲突相关犯罪设特别和平法庭。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system, 1991 constitutional framework, Constitutional Court actively exercises judicial review, special peace tribunal for conflict-related crimes.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（19%）与所得税为主，佩特罗推动税改增加对富人与石油企业征税。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily VAT (19%) and income tax, Petro advancing tax reform to increase taxation on the wealthy and oil companies.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约72%），福音派增长显著，宗教多元化加速
religion.en: Predominantly Roman Catholic (~72%), significant evangelical growth, accelerating religious diversification

philosophy.zh: 社会公正与和平话语兴起，内战遗产塑造集体记忆，加西亚·马尔克斯的魔幻现实主义影响深远。
philosophy.en: Social justice and peace discourse rising, civil war legacy shaping collective memory, García Márquez's magical realism profoundly influential.

culturalAchievements.zh: 魔幻现实主义文学（加西亚·马尔克斯）、夏基拉与雷鬼音乐、咖啡文化、波哥大城市复兴。
culturalAchievements.en: Magical realism literature (García Márquez), Shakira and reggaeton, coffee culture, Bogotá's urban renaissance.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Spanish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 拉美第四大经济体，石油与矿业为传统支柱，数字经济与金融科技快速增长，Rappi成为超级应用标杆。
gdpDescription.en: Latin America's fourth-largest economy, oil and mining as traditional pillars, digital economy and fintech growing rapidly, Rappi becoming a super-app benchmark.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、咖啡、煤炭、鲜花出口、金融科技、数字服务、旅游业
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, coffee, coal, flower exports, fintech, digital services, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 石油、咖啡、煤炭、鲜花、香蕉、黄金、翡翠
tradeGoods.en: Oil, coffee, coal, flowers, bananas, gold, emeralds

householdWealth.zh: 贫困率约40%，城市中产阶级扩大但不平等严重，农村地区发展滞后。
householdWealth.en: Poverty rate around 40%, urban middle class expanding but inequality severe, rural areas lagging in development.

tradeRoutes.zh: 美国为最大贸易伙伴，与中国、欧盟贸易增长，太平洋联盟成员，咖啡出口遍及全球。
tradeRoutes.en: US as largest trade partner, growing trade with China and EU, Pacific Alliance member, coffee exports worldwide.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主，佩特罗推进社会化改革，增加国家在能源与医疗领域的干预。
economicSystem.en: Primarily market economy, Petro advancing social reforms, increasing state intervention in energy and healthcare.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约580亿美元，央行独立性强，通胀从2022年高点回落但仍高于目标。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $58 billion, strong central bank independence, inflation retreating from 2022 highs but still above target.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的55%，佩特罗政府面临扩大社会支出与财政纪律的平衡挑战。
debtLevel.en: Public debt approximately 55% of GDP, Petro government faces the challenge of balancing expanded social spending with fiscal discipline.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 佩特罗推行2022年税改法案增收约40亿美元/年，用于扩大社会安全网与和平实施。
fiscalPolicy.en: Petro enacted the 2022 tax reform raising ~$4 billion/year in revenue, funding expanded social safety net and peace implementation.

description.zh: 拉美最大规模陆军之一，数十年反游击与反毒战经验丰富。
description.en: One of Latin America's largest armies, with decades of counter-guerrilla and counter-narcotics experience.

description.zh: 负责加勒比海与太平洋海岸巡逻，打击海上走私。
description.en: Patrols Caribbean and Pacific coasts, combating maritime smuggling.

description.zh: 装备以色列狮鹫与巴西超级巨嘴鸟攻击机，反毒作战经验丰富。
description.en: Equipped with Israeli Kfir and Brazilian Super Tucano attack aircraft, extensive counter-narcotics experience.

technology.zh: 反游击与反毒作战经验丰富但重装备有限，接受美国大量军援与训练，无人机使用增加。
technology.en: Rich counter-guerrilla and counter-narcotics experience but limited heavy equipment, receives substantial US military aid and training, increasing drone use.

threats.zh: 残余FARC异见派、ELN游击队、贩毒集团、委内瑞拉边境紧张局势。
threats.en: FARC dissident remnants, ELN guerrillas, drug cartels, border tensions with Venezuela.

recentBattles.zh: 与ELN和平谈判进行中，同时持续与贩毒集团和FARC异见派作战。
recentBattles.en: Peace negotiations with ELN ongoing, while continuing operations against drug cartels and FARC dissidents.

populationDescription.zh: 拉美第三人口大国，人口年轻但增长放缓，城市化加速，国内流离失所人口全球最多之一。
populationDescription.en: Latin America's third most populous nation, young population but growth slowing, urbanization accelerating, one of the world's highest internally displaced populations.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血（约49%）、白人（约37%）、非裔哥伦比亚人（约11%）、原住民（约4%）

socialClasses.zh: 城市中产阶级增长，但贫富差距极大，农村贫困率高，武装冲突遗留的社会创伤深重。
socialClasses.en: Urban middle class growing but extreme wealth gap, high rural poverty, deep social trauma from armed conflict legacy.

allies.zh: 美国（主要安全盟友）、太平洋联盟伙伴、北约全球合作伙伴。
allies.en: United States (major security ally), Pacific Alliance partners, NATO global partner.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与委内瑞拉马杜罗政权关系虽在佩特罗任内改善但仍复杂。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but relations with Venezuela's Maduro regime have improved under Petro but remain complex.

treaties.zh: 太平洋联盟、联合国、OAS、美哥自贸协定、北约全球合作伙伴。
treaties.en: Pacific Alliance, UN, OAS, US-Colombia FTA, NATO Global Partner.

foreignPolicy.zh: 佩特罗重新定位外交方向：恢复与委内瑞拉关系、推动与ELN和平、倡导区域整合与气候正义。
foreignPolicy.en: Petro reorienting foreign policy: restoring ties with Venezuela, pursuing peace with ELN, advocating regional integration and climate justice.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年恢复与委内瑞拉全面外交关系，推进与ELN停火谈判，主持地区和平对话。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Restored full diplomatic relations with Venezuela in 2023, advanced ELN ceasefire negotiations, hosted regional peace dialogue.

era.zh: 数字经济与金融科技发展期
era.en: Digital economy and fintech development era

keyInnovations.zh: Rappi超级应用、数字支付生态、波哥大智慧交通、农业科技。
keyInnovations.en: Rappi super-app, digital payment ecosystem, Bogotá smart transportation, agritech.

infrastructure.zh: 城市基础设施改善明显（麦德林创新区），但农村地区网络与公路覆盖不足。
infrastructure.en: Urban infrastructure notably improved (Medellín innovation district), but rural network and road coverage insufficient.

policy.zh: 2019年发布国家AI战略框架（CONPES 3975），设立AI伦理指南，推动公共部门AI应用。
policy.en: Released national AI strategic framework (CONPES 3975) in 2019, established AI ethics guidelines, promoting public sector AI adoption.

regulatoryStance.zh: 温和监管取向，注重AI伦理与数据保护，拉美首批制定AI伦理框架的国家之一。
regulatoryStance.en: Moderate regulatory approach, focused on AI ethics and data protection, one of the first Latin American countries to establish an AI ethics framework.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资处于早期阶段，麦德林与波哥大的科技园区吸引少量AI创业投资。
investmentScale.en: AI investment in early stages, tech parks in Medellín and Bogotá attracting limited AI startup investment.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的超级应用：外卖、快递、金融服务、电商
keyProducts.en: AI-driven super-app: food delivery, courier, financial services, e-commerce

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的房地产科技平台（iBuyer模式）
keyProducts.en: AI-driven proptech platform (iBuyer model)

contribution.zh: 将Rappi打造为拉美最大超级应用，AI算法驱动配送优化和个性化推荐。
contribution.en: Built Rappi into Latin America's largest super-app, with AI algorithms driving delivery optimization and personalized recommendations.

researchFocus.zh: 自然语言处理（西班牙语）、农业AI、城市交通优化、金融科技AI。
researchFocus.en: NLP (Spanish), agricultural AI, urban transportation optimization, fintech AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 依赖国际云服务，本土计算基础设施有限，安第斯大学与国立大学有小规模研究集群。
computeInfrastructure.en: Relies on international cloud services, limited local compute infrastructure, Universidad de los Andes and National University have small research clusters.

talentPool.zh: 软件开发人才充足（为美国科技公司重要外包地），但AI专业研究人才不足。
talentPool.en: Sufficient software development talent (important outsourcing destination for US tech companies), but insufficient AI research specialists.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约50-60位，拉美地区位列巴西、墨西哥、智利之后。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 50-60th globally in AI, behind Brazil, Mexico, and Chile in Latin America.

outlook.zh: Rappi等超级应用驱动AI应用普及，麦德林创新生态有潜力成为拉美AI中心之一。
outlook.en: Super-apps like Rappi drive AI adoption, Medellín's innovation ecosystem has potential to become one of Latin America's AI hubs.

strengths.zh: 年轻人口红利、麦德林创新生态、Rappi等成功科技企业、美国安全援助、丰富自然资源。
strengths.en: Young population dividend, Medellín innovation ecosystem, successful tech companies like Rappi, US security assistance, rich natural resources.

weaknesses.zh: 武装冲突遗留问题、毒品经济、社会不平等严重、基础设施城乡差距大、AI人才不足。
weaknesses.en: Armed conflict legacy, narco-economy, severe social inequality, urban-rural infrastructure gap, insufficient AI talent.

outlook.zh: 佩特罗的和平与改革议程面临执行挑战，但数字经济活力与人口红利为长期发展提供基础。
outlook.en: Petro's peace and reform agenda faces implementation challenges, but digital economy vitality and population dividend provide a foundation for long-term development.

description.zh: 2023年11月，哥伦比亚在首位左翼总统佩特罗领导下推进和平进程与社会改革。Rappi成为拉美超级应用标杆，麦德林从毒品之都转型为创新城市。国家AI战略框架初步建立，但AI发展仍处于早期阶段。与委内瑞拉恢复外交关系和ELN和平谈判标志着区域关系的新方向。
description.en: In November 2023, Colombia under its first leftist president Petro advances peace processes and social reform. Rappi has become Latin America's super-app benchmark, and Medellín has transformed from drug capital to innovation city. A national AI strategic framework is initially established, but AI development remains in early stages. Restored diplomatic ties with Venezuela and ELN peace negotiations mark new regional directions.

name.zh: 委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国
委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国

dynasty.zh: 统一社会主义党执政期（查韦斯主义延续）

governmentForm.zh: 名义上的联邦总统制共和国，实际为威权政体，行政权高度集中于总统。
governmentForm.en: Nominally a federal presidential republic, effectively an authoritarian regime with executive power highly concentrated in the presidency.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构因经济崩溃而瓦解，中产阶级大量外逃，贫困率超过80%，精英阶层与军方控制资源。
socialStructure.en: Social structure collapsed due to economic breakdown, massive middle-class exodus, poverty rate exceeds 80%, elites and military control resources.

rulingClass.zh: 马杜罗依靠军方、查韦斯主义政党机器和古巴安全顾问维持统治。
rulingClass.en: Maduro maintains rule through the military, the Chavista party machine, and Cuban security advisors.

succession.zh: 名义上总统由选举产生，但选举公正性受到国际社会广泛质疑。2024年大选面临反对派挑战。
succession.en: Nominally the president is elected, but election integrity is widely questioned internationally. The 2024 election faces opposition challenge.

structure.zh: 五权分立（行政、立法、司法、选举、公民）的宪法框架已被行政权架空，制宪议会凌驾于国会之上。
structure.en: The constitutional framework of five-branch separation (executive, legislative, judicial, electoral, citizen) has been undermined by executive overreach, constituent assembly superseded Congress.

function.zh: 管理国有石油公司PDVSA，曾为经济支柱但产量崩溃。
function.en: Manages state oil company PDVSA, once the economic pillar but production has collapsed.

function.zh: 管理武装力量，军队是马杜罗政权最重要支柱。
function.en: Manages armed forces, the military is the most important pillar of the Maduro regime.

function.zh: 管理严重萎缩的国家财政，实施价格管制与外汇管制。
function.en: Manages the severely contracted national finances, implements price controls and foreign exchange controls.

localAdmin.zh: 23个州与1个首都区，州长多为查韦斯主义者，地方行政能力因人才流失与资源匮乏而严重退化。
localAdmin.en: 23 states and 1 capital district, governors mostly Chavistas, local administrative capacity severely degraded by brain drain and resource scarcity.

legalSystem.zh: 名义上的大陆法系，但司法独立性丧失，最高法院服从于行政权，法治严重倒退。
legalSystem.en: Nominally civil law system, but judicial independence lost, Supreme Court subservient to executive power, severe rule of law regression.

taxationSystem.zh: 正规税收体系崩溃，政府依赖石油收入、货币发行（导致恶性通胀）与非正规渠道。
taxationSystem.en: Formal tax system collapsed, government depends on oil revenue, money printing (causing hyperinflation), and informal channels.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约70%），福音派增长中

philosophy.zh: 查韦斯主义/玻利瓦尔主义仍为官方意识形态，但民间社会对威权统治的反对日益强烈。
philosophy.en: Chavismo/Bolivarianism remains the official ideology, but civil society opposition to authoritarian rule grows increasingly strong.

culturalAchievements.zh: 委内瑞拉音乐体系（El Sistema青年管弦乐教育）、选美文化、棒球传统，但文化机构因危机严重退化。
culturalAchievements.en: El Sistema youth orchestra education, beauty pageant culture, baseball tradition, but cultural institutions severely degraded by the crisis.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Spanish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 经济自2014年以来萎缩约75%，石油产量从350万桶/日降至约80万桶/日。美国制裁部分放松后出口略有恢复。
gdpDescription.en: Economy contracted approximately 75% since 2014, oil production dropped from 3.5M to ~800K barrels/day. Exports slightly recovering after partial US sanctions relief.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油开采（严重衰退）、非正规经济、黄金开采（多为非法）、美元化的小型服务业
mainIndustries.en: Oil extraction (severely declined), informal economy, gold mining (mostly illegal), dollarized small-scale services

tradeGoods.zh: 原油（大幅减产）、黄金、铁矿石、铝
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil (drastically reduced), gold, iron ore, aluminum

name.zh: 委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔/美元

householdWealth.zh: 超过80%人口生活在贫困线以下，实际美元化加速，极少数权贵阶层通过黑市控制财富。
householdWealth.en: Over 80% of the population lives below the poverty line, de facto dollarization accelerating, a tiny elite class controls wealth through black markets.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华石油出口为主要渠道，古巴为政治盟友，美国制裁部分放松后雪佛龙恢复有限运营。
tradeRoutes.en: Oil exports to China as main channel, Cuba as political ally, Chevron resumed limited operations after partial US sanctions relief.

economicSystem.zh: 国家控制经济严重失灵，实际经济高度美元化与非正规化，黑市定价主导。
economicSystem.en: State-controlled economy severely dysfunctional, actual economy highly dollarized and informalized, black market pricing dominant.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备几乎耗尽，黄金储备被抵押或出售，央行信誉丧失殆尽。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves nearly depleted, gold reserves mortgaged or sold, central bank credibility virtually destroyed.

debtLevel.zh: 外债约1500亿美元（含PDVSA债务），已实质性违约，被多数国际资本市场排斥。
debtLevel.en: External debt approximately $150 billion (including PDVSA), in de facto default, excluded from most international capital markets.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政体系崩溃，政府通过货币发行与石油收入维持最低限度运转。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal system collapsed, government maintains minimal operations through money printing and oil revenue.

description.zh: 军队是政权核心支柱，军官深度介入政治与经济活动。
description.en: The army is the core pillar of the regime, officers deeply involved in political and economic activities.

description.zh: 装备老化但仍维持加勒比海存在。
description.en: Aging equipment but maintains Caribbean presence.

description.zh: 准军事力量，查韦斯创建用于社会控制与政权防卫。
description.en: Paramilitary force created by Chávez for social control and regime defense.

technology.zh: 主要装备为俄罗斯与中国武器（苏-30战机、T-72坦克），但维护能力严重不足，大量装备无法运作。
technology.en: Primarily Russian and Chinese weapons (Su-30 fighters, T-72 tanks), but severely lacking maintenance capability, much equipment non-operational.

threats.zh: 哥伦比亚边境武装团体、圭亚那埃塞奎博领土争端升级、国内政治动荡。
threats.en: Colombian border armed groups, escalating Essequibo territorial dispute with Guyana, domestic political instability.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年12月对圭亚那埃塞奎博地区举行主权公投，引发地区紧张。
recentBattles.en: Held sovereignty referendum on Guyana's Essequibo region in December 2023, raising regional tensions.

populationDescription.zh: 危机导致超过780万人外逃（全球最大难民危机之一），国内人口锐减，劳动力严重流失。
populationDescription.en: The crisis has caused over 7.8 million people to flee (one of the world's largest refugee crises), sharp domestic population decline, severe labor force loss.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血为主（约51%）、白人（约44%）、非裔（约4%）、原住民（约2%）

socialClasses.zh: 传统社会结构崩溃，极端贫富分化，军政官僚与玻利瓦尔资产阶级（boliburgueses）控制资源。
socialClasses.en: Traditional social structure collapsed, extreme wealth polarization, military-political bureaucracy and Bolivarian bourgeoisie (boliburgueses) control resources.

allies.zh: 古巴、中国、俄罗斯、伊朗、尼加拉瓜。

enemies.zh: 美国（制裁施压）、圭亚那（埃塞奎博争端），与多数拉美民主国家关系紧张。
enemies.en: United States (sanctions pressure), Guyana (Essequibo dispute), strained relations with most Latin American democracies.

treaties.zh: ALBA联盟、联合国、OPEC成员（产量配额大幅缩水）。
treaties.en: ALBA alliance, United Nations, OPEC member (production quota drastically reduced).

foreignPolicy.zh: 依靠中俄古巴支持维持政权存续，2023年与美国就制裁放松达成有限协议，对圭亚那采取领土进攻姿态。
foreignPolicy.en: Relies on Chinese, Russian, and Cuban support to sustain the regime, reached limited agreement with US on sanctions relief in 2023, adopted territorial aggression stance toward Guyana.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年10月与美国达成制裁放松协议（换取选举承诺），12月举行埃塞奎博主权公投引发国际关注。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Reached sanctions relief agreement with US in October 2023 (in exchange for election promises), Essequibo sovereignty referendum in December 2023 drew international attention.

era.zh: 技术倒退与基础设施崩溃期
era.en: Technological regression and infrastructure collapse era

keyInnovations.zh: 几乎无技术创新，依赖中国与伊朗技术援助维持基本石油生产，电信基础设施严重退化。
keyInnovations.en: Virtually no technological innovation, relies on Chinese and Iranian technical assistance to maintain basic oil production, telecommunications infrastructure severely degraded.

infrastructure.zh: 电力系统频繁停电，供水系统崩溃，公路铁路失修，互联网速度全球最慢之一。
infrastructure.en: Power system with frequent blackouts, water supply collapsed, roads and railways in disrepair, internet speed among the world's slowest.

policy.zh: 无AI政策或战略，政府关注点在政权存续而非技术发展。
policy.en: No AI policy or strategy, government focus is on regime survival rather than technological development.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI相关法规，数字监控技术（中国提供的ZTE系统）用于社会控制。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-related regulations, digital surveillance technology (ZTE system from China) used for social control.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零，科技人才大量外流至哥伦比亚、智利、西班牙和美国。
investmentScale.en: AI investment near zero, massive tech talent exodus to Colombia, Chile, Spain, and the US.

researchFocus.zh: 仅有极少数大学维持基础计算机科学教学，AI研究几乎不存在。
researchFocus.en: Only a very few universities maintain basic computer science teaching, AI research virtually nonexistent.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施几乎不存在，频繁停电使数据中心无法运作，无云服务能力。
computeInfrastructure.en: Compute infrastructure virtually nonexistent, frequent power outages render data centers inoperable, no cloud service capability.

talentPool.zh: IT人才严重外流，剩余人才多从事基础维护工作，AI专业人才几乎全部移民。
talentPool.en: Severe IT talent exodus, remaining talent mostly doing basic maintenance, AI specialists have almost entirely emigrated.

globalRanking.zh: AI能力在全球排名极低，远落后于拉美邻国。
globalRanking.en: AI capability ranked extremely low globally, far behind Latin American neighbors.

outlook.zh: 在政治经济危机未解决前，AI发展前景黯淡。仅有微弱希望来自海外委内瑞拉侨民AI人才。
outlook.en: AI development prospects bleak until the political-economic crisis is resolved. Only faint hope comes from overseas Venezuelan diaspora AI talent.

strengths.zh: 全球最大已探明石油储量、年轻人口、海外侨民人才网络。
strengths.en: World's largest proven oil reserves, young population, overseas diaspora talent network.

weaknesses.zh: 威权统治、经济崩溃、恶性通胀、大规模人口外流、基础设施瓦解、国际孤立。
weaknesses.en: Authoritarian rule, economic collapse, hyperinflation, massive population exodus, infrastructure breakdown, international isolation.

outlook.zh: 2024年大选将是关键转折点，但马杜罗政权让出权力的可能性极低。石油制裁放松可能带来有限经济改善。
outlook.en: The 2024 election will be a critical turning point, but the likelihood of the Maduro regime ceding power is extremely low. Partial sanctions relief may bring limited economic improvement.

description.zh: 2023年11月，委内瑞拉在马杜罗威权统治下继续深陷人道主义危机。超过780万人逃离该国，经济较2014年萎缩75%。石油产量从峰值350万桶/日降至约80万桶/日。美国在2023年10月部分放松制裁以换取自由选举承诺，但民主前景黯淡。中国提供的数字监控系统成为政权唯一的'AI'应用。
description.en: In November 2023, Venezuela under Maduro's authoritarian rule continues its deep humanitarian crisis. Over 7.8 million have fled the country, the economy has contracted 75% since 2014. Oil production dropped from a peak of 3.5M to ~800K barrels/day. The US partially eased sanctions in October 2023 in exchange for free election promises, but democratic prospects are dim. Chinese-provided digital surveillance systems are the regime's only 'AI' application.

governmentForm.zh: 单一制总统制共和国，三权分立，由25个大区和利马省组成。
governmentForm.en: Unitary presidential republic with separation of powers, comprising 25 regions and Lima Province.

socialStructure.zh: 城乡与族裔分裂严重，利马精英阶层与安第斯/亚马逊原住民社区间存在深刻鸿沟。
socialStructure.en: Severe urban-rural and ethnic divide, deep gulf between Lima's elite class and Andean/Amazonian indigenous communities.

rulingClass.zh: 博卢阿特在卡斯蒂略被罢免后继任，缺乏政治基础，依靠国会支持执政。
rulingClass.en: Boluarte succeeded after Castillo's removal, lacks political base, governs with congressional support.

succession.zh: 总统由直接选举产生，任期五年，不可连任。博卢阿特为副总统继任。
succession.en: The president is elected by direct vote for a five-year term, non-renewable. Boluarte succeeded as vice president.

structure.zh: 总统领导内阁，一院制国会（130席），政党碎片化严重，政治不稳定。
structure.en: President leads cabinet, unicameral Congress (130 seats), severe party fragmentation, political instability.

function.zh: 管理国家财政与经济政策，维持财政纪律传统。
function.en: Manages national finances and economic policy, maintaining fiscal discipline tradition.

function.zh: 监管铜、金、银等矿业资源开采，矿业为经济支柱。
function.en: Oversees copper, gold, silver mining resource extraction, mining as the economic pillar.

function.zh: 管理武装力量与国家安全。
function.en: Manages armed forces and national security.

function.zh: 管理交通基础设施与电信监管。
function.en: Manages transportation infrastructure and telecommunications regulation.

localAdmin.zh: 25个大区设民选区长，地方分权进展有限，安第斯高原与亚马逊地区行政覆盖薄弱。
localAdmin.en: 25 regions with elected governors, limited decentralization progress, weak administrative coverage in Andean highlands and Amazon region.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，1993年宪法框架，司法系统腐败严重，改革缓慢。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system, 1993 constitutional framework, severe judicial corruption, slow reforms.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（18%）与所得税为主，矿业特许权使用费为重要收入，非正规经济逃税严重。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily VAT (18%) and income tax, mining royalties as important revenue, severe tax evasion in the informal economy.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约74%），安第斯传统信仰与天主教融合
religion.en: Predominantly Roman Catholic (~74%), Andean traditional beliefs syncretized with Catholicism

philosophy.zh: 印加遗产与现代身份认同交织，城乡/族裔分裂塑造不同世界观。
philosophy.en: Inca heritage intertwined with modern identity, urban-rural/ethnic divides shape different worldviews.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语为主，克丘亚语和艾马拉语为官方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish primary, Quechua and Aymara as official languages)

culturalAchievements.zh: 马丘比丘与印加文明遗产、秘鲁美食革命（全球美食目的地）、马里奥·巴尔加斯·略萨（诺贝尔文学奖）。
culturalAchievements.en: Machu Picchu and Inca civilization heritage, Peruvian culinary revolution (global food destination), Mario Vargas Llosa (Nobel Literature Prize).

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语）及克丘亚语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish) and Quechuan language family

gdpDescription.zh: 矿业驱动型经济，铜产量全球第二，政治不稳定与社会抗议频繁影响投资环境。
gdpDescription.en: Mining-driven economy, second-largest copper producer globally, political instability and frequent social protests impacting investment climate.

mainIndustries.zh: 铜矿、金矿、锌矿、渔业、农产品（芦笋、蓝莓）、纺织、旅游
mainIndustries.en: Copper, gold, zinc mining, fishing, agricultural products (asparagus, blueberries), textiles, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 铜、金、锌、鱼粉、咖啡、芦笋、蓝莓、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Copper, gold, zinc, fishmeal, coffee, asparagus, blueberries, textiles

householdWealth.zh: 贫困率约27%，城乡差距巨大，矿业区域富裕但资源收益分配不均。
householdWealth.en: Poverty rate approximately 27%, vast urban-rural gap, mining regions wealthy but resource benefit distribution unequal.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大贸易伙伴（铜出口），与美国、欧盟、韩国有自贸协定，太平洋联盟与CPTPP成员。
tradeRoutes.en: China as largest trade partner (copper exports), FTAs with US, EU, South Korea, Pacific Alliance and CPTPP member.

economicSystem.zh: 以自由市场经济为基础，央行独立性强，财政纪律传统良好，但非正规经济占比达70%。
economicSystem.en: Based on free market economy, strong central bank independence, good fiscal discipline tradition, but informal economy accounts for 70%.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约740亿美元，央行审慎管理，财政稳定基金提供额外缓冲。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $74 billion, prudently managed by the central bank, fiscal stabilization fund provides additional buffer.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的34%，拉美地区较低水平。
debtLevel.en: Public debt approximately 34% of GDP, relatively low for the Latin American region.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政传统，通胀目标制有效运行，但政治不稳定影响中长期财政规划。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal tradition, inflation targeting regime functioning effectively, but political instability impacts medium-to-long-term fiscal planning.

description.zh: 负责国土防御与内部安全，在安第斯高原与亚马逊地区维持存在。
description.en: Responsible for territorial defense and internal security, maintaining presence in Andean highlands and Amazon region.

description.zh: 太平洋海岸防御与河流巡逻（亚马逊河），拥有潜艇能力。
description.en: Pacific coast defense and river patrol (Amazon River), possesses submarine capability.

description.zh: 装备包括米格-29与幻影2000战斗机，正寻求现代化升级。
description.en: Equipment includes MiG-29 and Mirage 2000 fighters, seeking modernization upgrades.

technology.zh: 装备混合（俄罗斯、法国、韩国），维护能力有限，反恐与反毒经验为主要优势。
technology.en: Mixed equipment (Russian, French, South Korean), limited maintenance capability, counter-terrorism and counter-narcotics experience as main strengths.

threats.zh: 光辉道路残余势力（与贩毒结合）、跨国有组织犯罪、厄瓜多尔边境安全。
threats.en: Shining Path remnants (combined with drug trafficking), transnational organized crime, Ecuador border security.

recentBattles.zh: 2022-2023年大规模社会抗议中军队参与维持秩序，导致数十人死亡引发人权争议。
recentBattles.en: Military involved in maintaining order during 2022-2023 mass social protests, resulting in dozens of deaths and human rights controversies.

populationDescription.zh: 人口增长放缓，利马都市区集中全国三分之一人口，安第斯与亚马逊地区人口稀疏。
populationDescription.en: Population growth slowing, Lima metropolitan area concentrates one-third of the national population, Andean and Amazon regions sparsely populated.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血（约60%）、克丘亚原住民（约22%）、白人（约6%）、艾马拉人、亚裔、非裔
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo (~60%), Quechua indigenous (~22%), white (~6%), Aymara, Asian, Afro-Peruvian

socialClasses.zh: 利马沿海城市精英与安第斯高原/亚马逊原住民社区间存在深刻的经济文化鸿沟。
socialClasses.en: Deep economic and cultural gulf between Lima's coastal urban elite and Andean highland/Amazonian indigenous communities.

allies.zh: 美国、太平洋联盟伙伴（智利、哥伦比亚、墨西哥）、中国（最大贸易伙伴）。
allies.en: United States, Pacific Alliance partners (Chile, Colombia, Mexico), China (largest trade partner).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，与智利和玻利维亚有历史领土争议但现已缓和。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, historical territorial disputes with Chile and Bolivia but now moderated.

treaties.zh: 太平洋联盟、CPTPP、联合国、OAS、安第斯共同体成员。
treaties.en: Pacific Alliance, CPTPP, UN, OAS, Andean Community member.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维持务实多边外交，平衡中美关系，博卢阿特政府外交重心在稳定国内局势。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintains pragmatic multilateral diplomacy, balancing US-China relations, Boluarte government's diplomatic focus on stabilizing domestic situation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年政治危机后外交活动减少，APEC 2024峰会将在利马举行为外交机遇。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Reduced diplomatic activity after 2023 political crisis, APEC 2024 summit in Lima presents a diplomatic opportunity.

era.zh: 数字化初期与矿业技术应用期
era.en: Early digitization and mining technology application era

keyInnovations.zh: 矿业自动化技术应用、移动支付普及（Yape）、农业灌溉技术。
keyInnovations.en: Mining automation technology adoption, mobile payments widespread (Yape), agricultural irrigation technology.

infrastructure.zh: 利马基础设施较好，但安第斯与亚马逊地区网络与交通极为薄弱，数字鸿沟严重。
infrastructure.en: Lima has relatively good infrastructure, but Andean and Amazon regions have extremely weak connectivity and transport, severe digital divide.

policy.zh: 2021年批准国家AI战略，但政治动荡导致执行几乎停滞。
policy.en: National AI strategy approved in 2021, but political turmoil has stalled implementation almost entirely.

regulatoryStance.zh: AI监管框架尚未建立，数据保护法律薄弱，政策注意力集中在政治稳定上。
regulatoryStance.en: AI regulatory framework not yet established, weak data protection laws, policy attention focused on political stability.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资极少，科技创业生态处于萌芽阶段，大部分投资集中在金融科技。
investmentScale.en: Very little AI investment, tech startup ecosystem in nascent stage, most investment concentrated in fintech.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的在线教育与企业培训平台
keyProducts.en: AI-driven online education and corporate training platform

researchFocus.zh: 矿业AI优化、农业遥感、自然语言处理（西班牙语/克丘亚语）。
researchFocus.en: Mining AI optimization, agricultural remote sensing, NLP (Spanish/Quechua).

computeInfrastructure.zh: 几乎完全依赖国际云服务，本土计算基础设施极度有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Almost entirely dependent on international cloud services, extremely limited local compute infrastructure.

talentPool.zh: 工程人才有限，AI研究人员极少，人才外流至智利与美国，利马大学有小规模研究组。
talentPool.en: Limited engineering talent, very few AI researchers, brain drain to Chile and US, University of Lima has small research groups.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名70位以外，拉美地区处于中下水平。
globalRanking.en: Ranked outside top 70 globally in AI, mid-to-lower level in Latin America.

outlook.zh: 政治稳定是AI发展的前提条件，矿业AI应用有小规模增长潜力，但整体前景受制于治理危机。
outlook.en: Political stability is a prerequisite for AI development, mining AI applications have small-scale growth potential, but overall prospects constrained by governance crisis.

strengths.zh: 丰富矿产资源（全球第二大铜产国）、审慎财政传统、丰富文化遗产与旅游资源。
strengths.en: Rich mineral resources (world's second-largest copper producer), prudent fiscal tradition, rich cultural heritage and tourism resources.

weaknesses.zh: 极端政治不稳定、严重社会分裂、基础设施落后、非正规经济庞大、AI发展滞后。
weaknesses.en: Extreme political instability, severe social division, lagging infrastructure, large informal economy, underdeveloped AI sector.

outlook.zh: 政治稳定性是所有发展的前提，矿业为经济提供缓冲但无法弥补治理缺陷，社会和解任重道远。
outlook.en: Political stability is the prerequisite for all development, mining provides economic buffer but cannot compensate for governance deficits, social reconciliation has a long road ahead.

description.zh: 2023年11月，秘鲁在博卢阿特总统领导下陷入持续政治危机。2022年底卡斯蒂略被罢免后引发的大规模抗议导致数十人死亡，政府合法性受到严重质疑。作为全球第二大铜产国，经济基本面尚可但政治不确定性抑制投资。AI发展几乎停滞，仅矿业自动化有微弱应用。
description.en: In November 2023, Peru under President Boluarte is mired in a continuing political crisis. Mass protests following Castillo's removal in late 2022 resulted in dozens of deaths, severely questioning government legitimacy. As the world's second-largest copper producer, economic fundamentals are fair but political uncertainty suppresses investment. AI development is almost stagnant, with only weak mining automation applications.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制君主立宪国，英国君主为名义国家元首，由6个州和2个领地组成。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary constitutional monarchy with the British monarch as nominal head of state, comprising 6 states and 2 territories.

socialStructure.zh: 高度发达的多元文化社会，移民占人口近30%，中产阶级庞大，原住民社会经济差距仍然显著。
socialStructure.en: Highly developed multicultural society, immigrants comprising nearly 30% of population, large middle class, indigenous socioeconomic gaps remain significant.

rulingClass.zh: 工党政府执政，与工会运动关系密切，同时维持与商业界的合作。
rulingClass.en: Labor government in power, closely tied to the union movement, while maintaining cooperation with the business community.

succession.zh: 总理由执政党领袖担任，需获得众议院多数支持，大选至少每三年举行一次。
succession.en: The prime minister is the leader of the governing party, requiring House of Representatives majority support, elections held at least every three years.

structure.zh: 联邦议会制，两院制（参议院与众议院），总督代表英王行使名义权力，内阁实行集体负责制。
structure.en: Federal parliamentary system, bicameral (Senate and House of Representatives), Governor-General represents the monarch, cabinet operates under collective responsibility.

function.zh: 管理联邦财政政策、税收与经济改革。
function.en: Manages federal fiscal policy, taxation, and economic reform.

function.zh: 管理澳大利亚国防军与AUKUS核潜艇项目。
function.en: Manages the Australian Defence Force and the AUKUS nuclear submarine program.

name.en: Department of Industry, Science and Resources

function.zh: 推动科技创新、矿业资源管理与AI战略实施。
function.en: Promotes science and technology innovation, mining resource management, and AI strategy implementation.

function.zh: 管理移民、边境安全、网络安全与关键基础设施保护。
function.en: Manages immigration, border security, cybersecurity, and critical infrastructure protection.

localAdmin.zh: 6个州与2个领地各设议会与州/领地政府，地方议会管理市镇事务，联邦制下各州权力较大。
localAdmin.en: Each of 6 states and 2 territories has a parliament and government, local councils manage municipal affairs, states have substantial powers under the federal system.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法体系，联邦宪法为最高法律，高等法院拥有终审与违宪审查权。
legalSystem.en: Common law system, federal constitution as supreme law, High Court holds final appellate and constitutional review authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦税以个人所得税与商品服务税（GST 10%）为主，矿业资源租赁税为重要收入来源。
taxationSystem.en: Federal taxation centered on individual income tax and goods and services tax (GST 10%), mining resource rent tax as an important revenue source.

religion.zh: 基督教（约44%）、无宗教人口快速增长（约39%）、伊斯兰、佛教等多元共存
religion.en: Christianity (~44%), non-religious population growing rapidly (~39%), Islam, Buddhism, and other faiths coexist

philosophy.zh: 多元文化主义、egalitarianism（平等主义）传统、实用主义、原住民和解运动。
philosophy.en: Multiculturalism, egalitarian tradition, pragmatism, indigenous reconciliation movement.

culturalAchievements.zh: 原住民Voice公投辩论（2023年被否决）、世界遗产（大堡礁、乌鲁鲁）、电影与音乐产业、体育文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Indigenous Voice referendum debate (rejected in 2023), World Heritage sites (Great Barrier Reef, Uluru), film and music industry, sporting culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语为国家通用语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (English as the national lingua franca)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第十三大经济体，矿业与服务业双引擎驱动，对中国贸易依存度高，30年无衰退记录在疫情后中断。
gdpDescription.en: World's thirteenth-largest economy, dual-engine driven by mining and services, high trade dependence on China, 30-year recession-free record interrupted post-pandemic.

mainIndustries.zh: 矿业（铁矿石、煤、锂）、金融服务、教育出口、科技（Canva、Atlassian）、农业、旅游
mainIndustries.en: Mining (iron ore, coal, lithium), financial services, education exports, tech (Canva, Atlassian), agriculture, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 铁矿石、煤炭、天然气（LNG）、锂、教育服务、小麦、牛肉
tradeGoods.en: Iron ore, coal, natural gas (LNG), lithium, education services, wheat, beef

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数全球最高之一，但住房可负担性危机严重，悉尼墨尔本房价全球前列。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth among the world's highest, but severe housing affordability crisis, Sydney and Melbourne property prices among the world's highest.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大贸易伙伴（铁矿石、煤），日本、韩国、美国、印度为主要市场，RCEP与CPTPP成员。
tradeRoutes.en: China as largest trade partner (iron ore, coal), Japan, South Korea, US, India as major markets, RCEP and CPTPP member.

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济，政府通过审慎的宏观经济框架、强制养老金制度（Superannuation）与矿业税收调节经济。
economicSystem.en: Free market economy, government regulates through a prudent macroeconomic framework, mandatory superannuation system, and mining taxation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 未来基金（Future Fund）等主权财富基金约2000亿美元，矿业繁荣税收为财政提供坚实基础。
treasuryDescription.en: Future Fund and other sovereign wealth funds approximately $200 billion, mining boom taxation provides a solid fiscal foundation.

debtLevel.zh: 联邦政府债务约占GDP的35%，在发达国家中处于较低水平。
debtLevel.en: Federal government debt approximately 35% of GDP, relatively low among developed nations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 阿尔巴尼斯政府推进能源转型补贴、住房可负担性改革与国防支出增加（AUKUS）。
fiscalPolicy.en: Albanese government advancing energy transition subsidies, housing affordability reform, and increased defense spending (AUKUS).

description.zh: 职业化陆军，装备先进，与美军高度互操作。
description.en: Professional army, well-equipped, highly interoperable with US forces.

description.zh: AUKUS核潜艇计划将使海军实力大幅跃升，目前装备霍巴特级驱逐舰。
description.en: AUKUS nuclear submarine program will significantly boost naval capability, currently equipped with Hobart-class destroyers.

description.zh: 装备F-35A隐身战斗机与E-7A预警机，印太地区重要空中力量。
description.en: Equipped with F-35A stealth fighters and E-7A AEW&C aircraft, an important air power in the Indo-Pacific.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督/总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯

technology.zh: 装备先进西方武器系统，AUKUS核潜艇协议为历史性升级，AI辅助情报与监控系统先进。
technology.en: Advanced Western weapons systems, AUKUS nuclear submarine agreement as historic upgrade, advanced AI-assisted intelligence and surveillance systems.

threats.zh: 中国在太平洋的军事扩张、台海局势、太平洋岛国安全、网络威胁。
threats.en: China's military expansion in the Pacific, Taiwan Strait situation, Pacific island nations security, cyber threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接军事冲突。参与阿富汗战争后的战争罪调查，支持乌克兰军事援助。
recentBattles.en: No direct military conflicts. Post-Afghanistan war crimes investigation ongoing, supporting Ukraine military aid.

populationDescription.zh: 主要依靠移民驱动人口增长，亚裔移民比例快速增加，老龄化加速但慢于多数发达国家。
populationDescription.en: Population growth primarily immigration-driven, Asian immigrant proportion rapidly increasing, aging accelerating but slower than most developed nations.

ethnicGroups.zh: 英国与爱尔兰裔（约36%）、其他欧洲裔（约24%）、亚裔（约17%）、原住民与托雷斯海峡岛民（约3.8%）
ethnicGroups.en: British and Irish descent (~36%), other European (~24%), Asian (~17%), Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander (~3.8%)

socialClasses.zh: 庞大中产阶级为社会主体，矿业与金融精英为高收入群体，原住民社区面临系统性劣势。
socialClasses.en: Large middle class as social majority, mining and finance elites as high-income group, indigenous communities face systemic disadvantages.

allies.en: United States (AUKUS, ANZUS), United Kingdom (AUKUS), Japan, New Zealand, India (Quad).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与中国关系复杂（最大贸易伙伴兼战略竞争者），中方贸易制裁部分解除。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but complex relations with China (largest trade partner and strategic competitor), Chinese trade sanctions partially lifted.

treaties.en: AUKUS, ANZUS, Quad, RCEP, CPTPP, Five Eyes.

foreignPolicy.zh: 阿尔巴尼斯在维持美国同盟的同时修复对华关系，加强太平洋岛国外交，提升印太存在。
foreignPolicy.en: Albanese maintains the US alliance while repairing ties with China, strengthening Pacific island diplomacy, enhancing Indo-Pacific presence.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年阿尔巴尼斯访华修复双边关系，中国解除部分贸易制裁；原住民Voice公投失败引发国内辩论。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Albanese's 2023 China visit repaired bilateral ties, China lifted some trade sanctions; Indigenous Voice referendum failure sparked domestic debate.

era.zh: AI与数字经济前沿发达国家
era.en: Advanced AI and digital economy frontier nation

keyInnovations.zh: Canva AI设计工具、Atlassian协作平台AI功能、CSIRO Data61研究、量子计算研究、Harrison.ai医疗AI。
keyInnovations.en: Canva AI design tools, Atlassian collaboration platform AI features, CSIRO Data61 research, quantum computing research, Harrison.ai medical AI.

infrastructure.zh: 高质量数字基础设施，NBN宽带网络覆盖全国，多个大型数据中心，可再生能源转型加速。
infrastructure.en: High-quality digital infrastructure, NBN broadband network covering nationwide, multiple large data centers, accelerating renewable energy transition.

policy.zh: 2023年发布国家AI安全合作框架，工业科学部统筹AI研究投资，参与全球AI安全治理。
policy.en: Released National AI Safety Cooperation Framework in 2023, Department of Industry and Science coordinates AI research investment, participates in global AI safety governance.

regulatoryStance.zh: 审慎监管取向，强调AI安全与负责任创新，推进自愿性AI伦理框架，考虑立法规制高风险AI。
regulatoryStance.en: Prudent regulatory approach, emphasizing AI safety and responsible innovation, advancing voluntary AI ethics framework, considering legislation for high-risk AI.

investmentScale.zh: 政府AI研究年投入约5亿澳元，私营部门AI投资增长迅速，总规模约30亿美元/年。
investmentScale.en: Government AI research investment approximately AUD 500 million/year, private sector AI investment growing rapidly, total scale approximately $3 billion/year.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的在线设计平台（Magic Design、Text to Image）
keyProducts.en: AI-driven online design platform (Magic Design, Text to Image)

keyProducts.zh: Atlassian Intelligence（AI驱动的项目管理与协作工具）
keyProducts.en: Atlassian Intelligence (AI-driven project management and collaboration tools)

keyProducts.zh: AI医疗影像诊断（Annalise.ai放射影像AI）
keyProducts.en: AI medical imaging diagnostics (Annalise.ai radiology AI)

contribution.zh: 将Canva打造为全球最大AI设计平台，估值260亿美元，澳大利亚最成功科技企业。
contribution.en: Built Canva into the world's largest AI design platform, valued at $26 billion, Australia's most successful tech company.

contribution.zh: 推动AI在医疗影像诊断领域的突破性应用。
contribution.en: Driving breakthrough applications of AI in medical imaging diagnostics.

researchFocus.zh: AI安全与负责任AI、医疗AI、矿业自动化AI、农业AI、量子计算。
researchFocus.en: AI safety and responsible AI, medical AI, mining automation AI, agricultural AI, quantum computing.

computeInfrastructure.zh: AWS、Azure、GCP在澳均有大型数据中心区域，CSIRO拥有高性能计算集群，国家量子战略推进中。
computeInfrastructure.en: AWS, Azure, GCP all have large data center regions in Australia, CSIRO has high-performance computing clusters, National Quantum Strategy advancing.

talentPool.zh: 世界级研究型大学（墨尔本、悉尼、ANU），CSIRO Data61有300+AI研究员，但相对规模小，竞争美国人才。
talentPool.en: World-class research universities (Melbourne, Sydney, ANU), CSIRO Data61 has 300+ AI researchers, but relatively small scale, competing with US for talent.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约第10-12位，在亚太地区位列中日韩之后。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 10-12th globally in AI, behind China, Japan, and South Korea in Asia-Pacific.

outlook.zh: Canva与Atlassian的AI整合显示应用层创新实力，AI安全研究可成为全球利基优势，矿业AI有独特发展空间。
outlook.en: Canva and Atlassian's AI integration shows application-layer innovation strength, AI safety research can become a global niche advantage, mining AI has unique development potential.

strengths.zh: 高质量教育与研究体系、丰富矿产资源（锂、稀土）、成功科技企业（Canva、Atlassian）、五眼联盟情报优势。
strengths.en: High-quality education and research system, rich mineral resources (lithium, rare earths), successful tech companies (Canva, Atlassian), Five Eyes intelligence advantage.

weaknesses.zh: 市场规模有限、对中国贸易依存度高、距全球科技中心远、人才流失至美国、住房危机。
weaknesses.en: Limited market size, high trade dependence on China, distance from global tech centers, talent loss to the US, housing crisis.

outlook.zh: AUKUS深化安全合作同时管控对华关系，矿产资源在AI硬件供应链中战略价值提升，AI应用层创新是核心竞争力。
outlook.en: AUKUS deepens security cooperation while managing China ties, mineral resources' strategic value in AI hardware supply chain rising, application-layer AI innovation is the core competitive strength.

description.zh: 2023年11月，澳大利亚在阿尔巴尼斯总理领导下保持经济稳健与战略平衡。Canva（260亿美元估值）与Atlassian（500亿美元市值）是全球知名的AI应用企业，CSIRO Data61引领国家AI研究。AUKUS核潜艇协议深化与美英安全合作的同时，阿尔巴尼斯访华修复经贸关系。原住民Voice公投失败成为重要社会议题。锂矿与稀土资源在AI芯片供应链中地位凸显。
description.en: In November 2023, Australia under PM Albanese maintains economic robustness and strategic balance. Canva ($26B valuation) and Atlassian ($50B market cap) are globally recognized AI application companies, CSIRO Data61 leads national AI research. The AUKUS nuclear submarine agreement deepens security cooperation with the US and UK, while Albanese's China visit repairs trade relations. The Indigenous Voice referendum failure became a major social issue. Lithium and rare earth resources gain prominence in the AI chip supply chain.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，英国君主为名义国家元首，单一制政府，一院制国会。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy with the British monarch as nominal head of state, unitary government, unicameral Parliament.

socialStructure.zh: 高度发达的福利社会，毛利人权利保障较好但社会经济差距仍存，中产阶级为社会主体。
socialStructure.en: Highly developed welfare society, Māori rights well-protected but socioeconomic gaps persist, middle class as social majority.

rulingClass.zh: 卢克森领导的国家党在2023年10月大选中获胜，与行动党和新西兰优先党组建联合政府。
rulingClass.en: Luxon's National Party won the October 2023 election, forming a coalition with ACT and NZ First parties.

succession.zh: 总理由执政党/联盟领袖担任，需获得国会多数支持，大选至少每三年举行。
succession.en: The prime minister is the leader of the governing party/coalition, requiring parliamentary majority support, elections held at least every three years.

structure.zh: 一院制国会（120席，MMP混合比例代表制），内阁集体负责制，总督代表英王。
structure.en: Unicameral Parliament (120 seats, MMP mixed-member proportional), cabinet collective responsibility, Governor-General represents the monarch.

function.zh: 管理国家财政与经济政策，卢克森优先关注生活成本与经济增长。
function.en: Manages national finances and economic policy, with Luxon prioritizing cost of living and economic growth.

function.zh: 管理新西兰国防军，小规模但专业化。
function.en: Manages the New Zealand Defence Force, small but professional.

name.en: Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment

function.zh: 推动经济发展、创新与数字化政策。
function.en: Promotes economic development, innovation, and digital policy.

localAdmin.zh: 78个地方政府（含11个区域议会和67个地区议会），毛利选区保障原住民政治代表权。
localAdmin.en: 78 local governments (including 11 regional councils and 67 territorial authorities), Māori electorates ensure indigenous political representation.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法体系，无成文宪法但有关键宪法性法规，最高法院为终审法院。
legalSystem.en: Common law system, no single written constitution but key constitutional statutes, Supreme Court as final court of appeal.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高39%）与商品服务税（GST 15%）为主，卢克森承诺减税。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily individual income tax (top rate 39%) and goods and services tax (GST 15%), Luxon has promised tax cuts.

religion.zh: 基督教（约37%）、无宗教人口快速增长（约49%）、毛利传统信仰
religion.en: Christianity (~37%), non-religious population rapidly growing (~49%), Māori traditional beliefs

philosophy.zh: 进步主义传统（首个女性投票权国家）、环境保护意识强烈、毛利文化复兴运动。
philosophy.en: Progressive tradition (first country with women's suffrage), strong environmental consciousness, Māori cultural renaissance movement.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语与毛利语均为官方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English and Māori both official languages)

culturalAchievements.zh: 指环王电影系列（维塔工作室）、毛利文化传承、全黑队橄榄球、纯净自然品牌形象。
culturalAchievements.en: Lord of the Rings film series (Weta Workshop), Māori cultural heritage, All Blacks rugby, clean green brand image.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语）与南岛语系（毛利语）

gdpDescription.zh: 高收入小型开放经济体，以农牧业出口与旅游为支柱，面临通胀与住房可负担性压力。
gdpDescription.en: High-income small open economy, agriculture exports and tourism as pillars, facing inflation and housing affordability pressures.

mainIndustries.zh: 乳制品（恒天然）、肉类与羊毛、旅游业、影视制作（维塔工作室）、科技、葡萄酒
mainIndustries.en: Dairy (Fonterra), meat and wool, tourism, film production (Weta Workshop), tech, wine

tradeGoods.zh: 乳制品、羊肉、牛肉、木材、猕猴桃、葡萄酒
tradeGoods.en: Dairy products, lamb, beef, timber, kiwifruit, wine

householdWealth.zh: 生活水平高但住房危机严重，房价收入比全球最高之列，年轻人置业困难。
householdWealth.en: High living standards but severe housing crisis, housing price-to-income ratio among the world's highest, young people struggling to buy homes.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大贸易伙伴（乳制品出口），澳大利亚、美国、日本为重要市场，RCEP与CPTPP成员。
tradeRoutes.en: China as largest trade partner (dairy exports), Australia, US, Japan as important markets, RCEP and CPTPP member.

economicSystem.zh: 高度开放的自由市场经济，政府干预较少，卢克森政府推进减税与减少监管。
economicSystem.en: Highly open free market economy, limited government intervention, Luxon government advancing tax cuts and deregulation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 新西兰超级基金（NZ Super Fund）约400亿新元，财政状况整体健康。
treasuryDescription.en: NZ Super Fund approximately NZD 40 billion, overall fiscal health sound.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的20%，在发达国家中处于极低水平。
debtLevel.en: Government debt approximately 20% of GDP, extremely low among developed nations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 卢克森承诺减税以降低生活成本，同时控制政府支出增长。
fiscalPolicy.en: Luxon promised tax cuts to reduce cost of living while controlling government spending growth.

description.zh: 小规模职业化陆军，专长维和与人道主义援助。
description.en: Small professional army, specializing in peacekeeping and humanitarian assistance.

description.zh: 重点在于海洋巡逻与太平洋岛国安全。
description.en: Focus on maritime patrol and Pacific island nations security.

description.zh: 以运输与巡逻飞机为主，无战斗机编制。
description.en: Primarily transport and patrol aircraft, no fighter jet fleet.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督/总理克里斯托弗·卢克森

technology.zh: 装备有限但质量较高，注重网络安全与情报合作（五眼联盟），无核政策。
technology.en: Limited but quality equipment, focus on cybersecurity and intelligence cooperation (Five Eyes), nuclear-free policy.

threats.zh: 无直接军事威胁，太平洋地区中国影响力扩大为主要战略关切。
threats.en: No direct military threats, China's expanding influence in the Pacific as the primary strategic concern.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期军事冲突。参与太平洋岛国安全援助与联合国维和。
recentBattles.en: No recent military conflicts. Participates in Pacific island security assistance and UN peacekeeping.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以移民增长为主，毛利人约占17%，亚裔人口快速增长，高度城市化。
populationDescription.en: Population growth primarily immigration-driven, Māori approximately 17%, Asian population growing rapidly, highly urbanized.

ethnicGroups.zh: 欧洲裔（约64%）、毛利人（约17%）、太平洋岛民（约8%）、亚裔（约16%）
ethnicGroups.en: European descent (~64%), Māori (~17%), Pacific peoples (~8%), Asian (~16%)

socialClasses.zh: 中产阶级为主体的egalitarian社会，但住房危机加剧阶层分化，毛利社区仍面临经济劣势。
socialClasses.en: Egalitarian society with middle class as majority, but housing crisis deepening class division, Māori communities still facing economic disadvantages.

allies.zh: 澳大利亚（ANZUS、最密切盟友）、美国（五眼联盟）、英国、太平洋岛国。
allies.en: Australia (ANZUS, closest ally), United States (Five Eyes), United Kingdom, Pacific island nations.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，对华立场审慎，维持贸易关系的同时表达对人权的关切。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, cautious stance on China, maintaining trade relations while expressing human rights concerns.

treaties.zh: ANZUS、五眼联盟、RCEP、CPTPP、太平洋岛国论坛。
treaties.en: ANZUS, Five Eyes, RCEP, CPTPP, Pacific Islands Forum.

foreignPolicy.zh: 卢克森维持亲西方外交路线，优先太平洋关系，对华政策在经贸务实与价值观立场间平衡。
foreignPolicy.en: Luxon maintains pro-Western diplomatic line, Pacific relations as priority, China policy balancing trade pragmatism with values-based stance.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年10月大选政权更替，卢克森政府重新审视对华政策与太平洋战略。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: October 2023 election power transition, Luxon government reviewing China policy and Pacific strategy.

era.zh: 数字化与农业科技前沿

keyInnovations.zh: 农业精准科技、Xero云会计AI功能、Rocket Lab太空发射、维塔工作室视觉特效。
keyInnovations.en: Precision agritech, Xero cloud accounting AI features, Rocket Lab space launches, Weta Workshop visual effects.

infrastructure.zh: 高质量宽带网络覆盖，清洁能源占电力80%以上（水电为主），数字政务先进。
infrastructure.en: High-quality broadband coverage, clean energy over 80% of electricity (primarily hydroelectric), advanced digital government services.

policy.zh: 2023年发布AI战略框架草案，关注负责任AI使用，政府数字服务中试点AI应用。
policy.en: Released AI strategic framework draft in 2023, focused on responsible AI use, piloting AI applications in government digital services.

regulatoryStance.zh: 温和监管取向，注重隐私保护与AI伦理，倾向于与澳大利亚协调监管方法。
regulatoryStance.en: Moderate regulatory approach, focused on privacy protection and AI ethics, inclined to coordinate regulatory methods with Australia.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模小但增长中，政府AI研究资助约5000万新元/年，科技创业生态活跃。
investmentScale.en: AI investment small but growing, government AI research funding approximately NZD 50 million/year, active tech startup ecosystem.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的云会计平台（银行对账自动化、发票分类AI）
keyProducts.en: AI-driven cloud accounting platform (bank reconciliation automation, invoice classification AI)

keyProducts.zh: AI数字人与虚拟助手（情感计算AI）
keyProducts.en: AI digital humans and virtual assistants (affective computing AI)

contribution.zh: 奥斯卡获奖视觉特效专家转型AI，开发全球领先的情感计算AI数字人。
contribution.en: Oscar-winning visual effects expert turned AI pioneer, developing world-leading affective computing AI digital humans.

researchFocus.zh: 农业AI、情感计算AI、环境监测AI、数字政务AI。
researchFocus.en: Agricultural AI, affective computing AI, environmental monitoring AI, digital government AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 依赖澳大利亚和国际云服务商，本土计算资源有限，大学有中小规模研究集群。
computeInfrastructure.en: Relies on Australian and international cloud providers, limited local compute resources, universities have small-to-medium research clusters.

talentPool.zh: AI人才规模小但质量高，奥克兰大学与坎特伯雷大学有AI研究组，人才外流至澳大利亚与美国。
talentPool.en: Small but high-quality AI talent pool, University of Auckland and University of Canterbury have AI research groups, talent loss to Australia and the US.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约25-30位，人均AI能力突出。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 25-30th globally in AI, outstanding per-capita AI capability.

outlook.zh: Soul Machines等企业展示利基创新实力，农业AI有独特发展空间，但规模限制整体影响力。
outlook.en: Companies like Soul Machines demonstrate niche innovation strength, agricultural AI has unique development potential, but scale limits overall impact.

strengths.zh: 高质量治理与透明度、清洁绿色品牌、创新文化（Soul Machines、Rocket Lab）、五眼情报合作。
strengths.en: High-quality governance and transparency, clean green brand, innovation culture (Soul Machines, Rocket Lab), Five Eyes intelligence cooperation.

weaknesses.zh: 市场极小、地理孤立、住房危机、对农产品出口依赖高、AI人才规模有限。
weaknesses.en: Very small market, geographic isolation, housing crisis, high dependence on agricultural exports, limited AI talent scale.

outlook.zh: 卢克森政府面临经济增长与生活成本双重挑战，利基科技创新是长期竞争力来源。
outlook.en: Luxon government faces dual challenges of economic growth and cost of living, niche tech innovation is the source of long-term competitiveness.

description.zh: 2023年10月，国家党领袖卢克森赢得大选，结束工党六年执政。新西兰虽是小型经济体，但在利基AI领域有突出创新：Soul Machines的AI数字人技术全球领先，Xero云会计平台服务全球350万企业。农业AI与环境监测AI有独特发展空间。政府债务率仅20%，财政状况全球最健康之一。
description.en: In October 2023, National Party leader Luxon won the election, ending six years of Labour government. While a small economy, New Zealand has outstanding innovation in niche AI: Soul Machines' digital human technology leads globally, Xero's cloud accounting platform serves 3.5 million businesses worldwide. Agricultural AI and environmental monitoring AI have unique development potential. Government debt at only 20% of GDP, among the healthiest fiscal positions globally.

dynasty.zh: 利库德集团联合执政期

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，一院制国会（Knesset，120席），总统为名义国家元首，总理掌握实权。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic, unicameral parliament (Knesset, 120 seats), president as nominal head of state, prime minister holds executive power.

socialStructure.zh: 高度多元化：世俗犹太人、正统犹太人、阿拉伯公民、德鲁兹人，科技精英阶层崛起，社会因司法改革严重分裂。
socialStructure.en: Highly diverse: secular Jews, Orthodox Jews, Arab citizens, Druze, rising tech elite class, society severely divided over judicial reform.

rulingClass.zh: 内塔尼亚胡领导的右翼宗教联盟，包括极端正统犹太教党派和极右翼民族主义者。
rulingClass.en: Netanyahu-led right-wing religious coalition, including ultra-Orthodox Jewish parties and far-right nationalists.

succession.zh: 总理由能组建国会多数联盟的党派领袖担任，大选至少每四年举行，但提前解散频繁。
succession.en: The prime minister is the party leader who can form a parliamentary majority coalition, elections at least every four years, but early dissolutions frequent.

structure.zh: 一院制国会（Knesset）120席，联合政府制，内塔尼亚胡领导有史以来最右翼政府。
structure.en: Unicameral parliament (Knesset) with 120 seats, coalition government system, Netanyahu leads the most right-wing government in history.

function.zh: 管理以色列国防军（IDF）与国防工业，October 7战争后进入全面战争状态。
function.en: Manages the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) and defense industry, entered full war footing after October 7.

function.zh: 管理国家财政，战时大幅增加国防预算。
function.en: Manages national finances, sharply increased defense budget during wartime.

name.en: Ministry of Innovation, Science and Technology

function.zh: 推进科技创新政策、AI战略与初创企业生态支持。
function.en: Advances science and technology innovation policy, AI strategy, and startup ecosystem support.

function.zh: 对外情报（摩萨德）与国内安全（辛贝特），AI在情报分析中深度应用。
function.en: Foreign intelligence (Mossad) and domestic security (Shin Bet), AI deeply applied in intelligence analysis.

localAdmin.zh: 6个行政区，256个地方政府（城市、地方议会和区域议会），被占领土由军事管理。
localAdmin.en: 6 administrative districts, 256 local governments (cities, local councils, and regional councils), occupied territories under military administration.

legalSystem.zh: 混合法律体系（普通法、大陆法与犹太教法），无成文宪法，基本法具有准宪法地位。2023年司法改革引发巨大争议。
legalSystem.en: Mixed legal system (common law, civil law, and Jewish law), no written constitution, Basic Laws have quasi-constitutional status. 2023 judicial reform sparked massive controversy.

taxationSystem.zh: 累进所得税（最高50%）、增值税（17%）、公司税（23%），科技企业享受税收优惠。
taxationSystem.en: Progressive income tax (top rate 50%), VAT (17%), corporate tax (23%), tech companies enjoy tax incentives.

religion.zh: 犹太教为主（约74%）、伊斯兰（约18%）、基督教与德鲁兹教
religion.en: Judaism predominant (~74%), Islam (~18%), Christianity and Druze

philosophy.zh: 犹太复国主义、创新与创业文化（Chutzpah精神）、军事安全至上主义、世俗与宗教价值观激烈博弈。
philosophy.en: Zionism, innovation and entrepreneurship culture (Chutzpah spirit), military security prioritization, fierce secular-religious values contestation.

writingSystem.zh: 希伯来字母（希伯来语）、阿拉伯字母（阿拉伯语）

culturalAchievements.zh: '创业之国'全球品牌、诺贝尔奖获得者众多、希伯来语复兴、死海古卷、现代以色列文学与电影。
culturalAchievements.en: 'Startup Nation' global brand, numerous Nobel Prize winners, Hebrew language revival, Dead Sea Scrolls, modern Israeli literature and cinema.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪米特语族（希伯来语与阿拉伯语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch (Hebrew and Arabic as official languages)

gdpDescription.zh: 高科技驱动的发达经济体，人均GDP全球前列，但October 7战争严重冲击经济，战时预算膨胀。
gdpDescription.en: High-tech driven developed economy, per capita GDP among the world's highest, but the October 7 war severely impacted the economy with wartime budget expansion.

mainIndustries.zh: 高科技与AI、网络安全、国防科技、半导体设计、生物医药、钻石加工、农业科技
mainIndustries.en: High-tech and AI, cybersecurity, defense tech, semiconductor design, biopharmaceuticals, diamond processing, agritech

tradeGoods.zh: 高科技产品、软件服务、国防装备、药品、钻石、农业技术
tradeGoods.en: High-tech products, software services, defense equipment, pharmaceuticals, diamonds, agricultural technology

householdWealth.zh: 科技行业从业者收入极高，但生活成本全球前列，住房价格高企，社会不平等加剧。
householdWealth.en: Tech industry workers earn extremely high incomes, but cost of living among the world's highest, housing prices elevated, social inequality worsening.

tradeRoutes.zh: 美国与欧盟为主要贸易伙伴，亚伯拉罕协议后与UAE、巴林贸易增长，对华科技出口受限。
