tradeRoutes.en: US and EU as major trade partners, growing trade with UAE and Bahrain post-Abraham Accords, China tech exports restricted.

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济，政府通过创新署（IIA）和研发补贴大力支持科技创业，国防工业与民用科技深度联动。
economicSystem.en: Free market economy, government strongly supports tech entrepreneurship through the Innovation Authority (IIA) and R&D subsidies, deep defense-civilian tech linkage.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约2000亿美元，央行在战争期间动用数十亿美元稳定谢克尔汇率。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $200 billion, central bank deployed billions to stabilize the shekel during the war.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的62%，战争预计将使债务率大幅上升。
debtLevel.en: Government debt approximately 62% of GDP, war expected to sharply increase the debt ratio.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 战时紧急财政扩张，国防预算翻倍，同时维持对科技行业的支持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Wartime emergency fiscal expansion, defense budget doubled, while maintaining support for the tech industry.

description.zh: October 7后全面动员，在加沙实施大规模地面进攻，AI辅助目标选定系统广泛使用。
description.en: Fully mobilized after October 7, conducting large-scale ground offensive in Gaza, AI-assisted target selection systems widely used.

description.zh: 装备F-35I（定制版）与F-16I，全球最先进空中打击能力之一，AI辅助精确制导。
description.en: Equipped with F-35I (customized) and F-16I, one of the world's most advanced air strike capabilities, AI-assisted precision guidance.

description.zh: 重点海上封锁与导弹艇作战，保卫天然气平台。
description.en: Focus on maritime blockade and missile boat operations, defending natural gas platforms.

description.zh: 全球顶级信号情报与网络作战单位，AI人才的主要培养基地，众多科技创始人出身于此。
description.en: World-class signals intelligence and cyber warfare unit, major training ground for AI talent, many tech founders originate here.

commanderInChief.zh: 总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡/总参谋长赫尔齐·哈列维
commanderInChief.en: PM Benjamin Netanyahu / Chief of Staff Herzi Halevi

technology.zh: 全球最先进军事技术之一，铁穹反导系统、箭式弹道导弹防御、AI自主武器系统、网络战能力世界领先。
technology.en: Among the world's most advanced military technology, Iron Dome anti-missile system, Arrow ballistic missile defense, AI autonomous weapons systems, world-leading cyber warfare capability.

unit.zh: 美元/年（战前，战时大幅增加）
unit.en: US dollars per year (pre-war, sharply increased during war)

threats.zh: 哈马斯（October 7袭击后加沙战争）、真主党（北部边境威胁）、伊朗核与导弹威胁、西岸暴力升级。
threats.en: Hamas (Gaza war after October 7 attack), Hezbollah (northern border threat), Iranian nuclear and missile threat, West Bank violence escalation.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年10月7日哈马斯突袭导致约1200人死亡，以色列随即发动加沙大规模军事行动。
recentBattles.en: October 7, 2023 Hamas assault killed approximately 1,200 people, Israel launched massive military operation in Gaza in response.

populationDescription.zh: 人口增长率发达国家最高（约2%/年），正统犹太人社区出生率极高，阿拉伯公民约21%。
populationDescription.en: Highest population growth rate among developed nations (~2%/year), ultra-Orthodox community has extremely high birth rate, Arab citizens approximately 21%.

ethnicGroups.zh: 犹太人（约74%，其中阿什肯纳兹、米兹拉希、塞法迪等）、阿拉伯人（约21%）、德鲁兹人、其他
ethnicGroups.en: Jewish (~74%, including Ashkenazi, Mizrahi, Sephardi, etc.), Arab (~21%), Druze, others

socialClasses.zh: 科技精英与国防/安全精英为高收入群体，正统犹太人社区经济参与率低，阿拉伯公民面临经济差距。
socialClasses.en: Tech elite and defense/security elite as high-income groups, Orthodox community has low economic participation, Arab citizens face economic gaps.

allies.zh: 美国（最坚定盟友，38亿美元/年军援）、亚伯拉罕协议国家（UAE、巴林、摩洛哥）。
allies.en: United States (staunchest ally, $3.8 billion/year military aid), Abraham Accords nations (UAE, Bahrain, Morocco).

enemies.zh: 伊朗（最大战略威胁）、哈马斯（加沙战争中）、真主党、叙利亚。
enemies.en: Iran (greatest strategic threat), Hamas (at war in Gaza), Hezbollah, Syria.

treaties.zh: 亚伯拉罕协议、美以战略同盟、与埃及和约旦的和平条约。
treaties.en: Abraham Accords, US-Israel strategic alliance, peace treaties with Egypt and Jordan.

foreignPolicy.zh: October 7后外交重心在获取国际支持加沙行动，沙特正常化谈判因战争搁置。
foreignPolicy.en: Post-October 7 diplomatic focus on securing international support for Gaza operations, Saudi normalization talks shelved due to war.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: October 7袭击后获美国全力支持，但加沙平民伤亡引发全球批评，联合国多次呼吁停火。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Received full US support after October 7 attack, but Gaza civilian casualties drew global criticism, UN repeatedly called for ceasefire.

keyInnovations.zh: AI军事应用（Gospel目标选定系统）、自动驾驶（Mobileye）、网络安全、量子技术、医疗科技。
keyInnovations.en: AI military applications (Gospel targeting system), autonomous driving (Mobileye), cybersecurity, quantum technology, medtech.

infrastructure.zh: 全球最密集的科技创业生态之一，每人均风投全球第一，8200部队退役人员构成科技人才管道。
infrastructure.en: One of the world's densest tech startup ecosystems, highest per-capita VC globally, Unit 8200 alumni form the tech talent pipeline.

policy.zh: 国家AI创新署推动AI发展，军方是AI技术最大推动者，8200部队为AI人才孵化器，战时AI军事应用加速。
policy.en: National AI Innovation Authority promotes AI development, military is the biggest AI technology driver, Unit 8200 serves as AI talent incubator, wartime AI military applications accelerating.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管宽松以鼓励创新，AI军事应用伦理争议激烈（Gospel系统引发国际关注），数据隐私法较弱。
regulatoryStance.en: Light regulation to encourage innovation, fierce ethical debate over AI military applications (Gospel system drew international attention), weak data privacy laws.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年AI领域投资约24亿美元，人均AI投资全球第一，1600+家AI初创企业。
investmentScale.en: AI investment approximately $2.4 billion in 2023, highest per-capita AI investment globally, 1,600+ AI startups.

capabilities.zh: 大语言模型，Jamba为创新的SSM-Transformer混合架构，长上下文处理能力突出。
capabilities.en: Large language model, Jamba features innovative SSM-Transformer hybrid architecture, outstanding long-context processing capability.

capabilities.zh: AI辅助军事目标选定系统，大幅提升打击速度与目标数量，引发严重伦理争议。
capabilities.en: AI-assisted military target selection system, dramatically increasing strike speed and target volume, raising serious ethical controversies.

keyProducts.zh: Jurassic-2与Jamba大语言模型、Wordtune写作助手
keyProducts.en: Jurassic-2 and Jamba LLMs, Wordtune writing assistant

keyProducts.zh: ADAS自动驾驶芯片与系统，全球80%+ADAS市场份额
keyProducts.en: ADAS autonomous driving chips and systems, 80%+ global ADAS market share

keyProducts.zh: AI计算资源编排与优化平台
keyProducts.en: AI compute resource orchestration and optimization platform

keyProducts.zh: Gaudi系列AI训练与推理加速器芯片
keyProducts.en: Gaudi series AI training and inference accelerator chips

contribution.zh: 自动驾驶视觉AI先驱，Mobileye成为全球ADAS标准制定者。
contribution.en: Autonomous driving vision AI pioneer, Mobileye became the global ADAS standard-setter.

contribution.zh: 斯坦福AI教授，创立AI21 Labs开发以色列首个大语言模型。
contribution.en: Stanford AI professor, founded AI21 Labs to develop Israel's first large language model.

contribution.zh: 以色列裔AI科学家，Coursera联合创始人，现用AI革新药物发现。
contribution.en: Israeli-born AI scientist, Coursera co-founder, now revolutionizing drug discovery with AI.

researchFocus.zh: AI军事应用、自动驾驶、网络安全AI、NLP、AI芯片设计、医疗AI。
researchFocus.en: AI military applications, autonomous driving, cybersecurity AI, NLP, AI chip design, medical AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 高密度数据中心，Intel与NVIDIA在以设有研发中心，军方拥有大规模计算资源，云服务快速扩展。
computeInfrastructure.en: High-density data centers, Intel and NVIDIA have R&D centers in Israel, military possesses large-scale compute resources, cloud services rapidly expanding.

talentPool.zh: 全球最密集的AI人才之一，8200部队退役人员+以色列理工学院+希伯来大学+魏茨曼研究所构成人才管道。
talentPool.en: Among the world's densest AI talent, Unit 8200 alumni + Technion + Hebrew University + Weizmann Institute form the talent pipeline.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约第5-6位，人均AI能力全球第一。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 5-6th globally in AI, highest per-capita AI capability in the world.

outlook.zh: October 7战争加速军事AI应用但冲击科技投资环境，AI伦理争议（Gospel系统）成为国际焦点。长期AI实力取决于地缘稳定性。
outlook.en: October 7 war accelerates military AI applications but impacts tech investment environment, AI ethics controversy (Gospel system) becomes an international focal point. Long-term AI strength depends on geopolitical stability.

strengths.zh: 全球顶级AI人才密度、1600+家AI初创企业、军民融合科技管道、美国坚定支持、创新文化。
strengths.en: World-class AI talent density, 1,600+ AI startups, military-civilian tech pipeline, steadfast US support, innovation culture.

weaknesses.zh: October 7战争冲击经济与投资环境、社会严重分裂（司法改革）、AI军事伦理争议、地缘风险极高。
weaknesses.en: October 7 war impacting economy and investment climate, severe social division (judicial reform), AI military ethics controversies, extremely high geopolitical risk.

outlook.zh: AI军事强国地位因战争进一步巩固，但人道主义代价与国际形象受损成为长期挑战。科技创业生态韧性强。
outlook.en: AI military powerhouse status further consolidated by war, but humanitarian costs and damaged international image are long-term challenges. Tech startup ecosystem resilience is strong.

description.zh: 2023年11月，以色列正处于October 7哈马斯袭击后的全面战争状态。尽管如此，以色列仍是全球AI强国：1600+家AI初创企业、24亿美元年投资额、Mobileye（170亿美元ADAS巨头）、AI21 Labs（Jamba模型）。战争中AI系统（Gospel目标生成系统）的使用引发严重伦理争议。8200部队继续输出顶级AI人才。内塔尼亚胡领导的极右翼联盟在战前因司法改革引发社会撕裂，战争暂时弥合分歧但根本矛盾未解。
description.en: In November 2023, Israel is in a state of full-scale war following the October 7 Hamas attack. Despite this, Israel remains a global AI powerhouse: 1,600+ AI startups, $2.4 billion annual investment, Mobileye ($17B ADAS giant), AI21 Labs (Jamba model). The use of AI systems (Gospel target generation) in war raises serious ethical controversies. Unit 8200 continues producing top AI talent. Netanyahu's far-right coalition tore society apart over judicial reform before the war; the conflict temporarily bridges divisions but fundamental contradictions remain unresolved.

governmentForm.zh: 绝对君主制，以伊斯兰教法（Sharia）为宪法基础，国王/王储集行政立法与部分司法权于一身。
governmentForm.en: Absolute monarchy with Sharia (Islamic law) as constitutional basis, King/Crown Prince concentrates executive, legislative, and partial judicial power.

socialStructure.zh: 传统部落与宗教精英社会正经历MBS推动的快速现代化，年轻人口渴望变革，女性权利有限扩展。
socialStructure.en: Traditional tribal and religious elite society undergoing rapid modernization driven by MBS, young population eager for change, women's rights limited expansion.

rulingClass.zh: 沙特王室（数千名王子），MBS高度集权，清洗异见王室成员（2017年丽思卡尔顿事件）。
rulingClass.en: House of Saud (thousands of princes), MBS highly centralized power, purged dissident royals (2017 Ritz-Carlton affair).

succession.zh: 世袭君主制，国王指定王储为继承人，MBS由父亲萨勒曼国王指定。
succession.en: Hereditary monarchy, the king designates the crown prince as successor, MBS designated by his father King Salman.

structure.zh: 国王/王储为最高权力核心，部长会议（内阁）执行政策，协商会议（Shura Council，150席）为咨询机构，无民选议会。
structure.en: King/Crown Prince as supreme power center, Council of Ministers (cabinet) implements policy, Shura Council (150 seats) as advisory body, no elected parliament.

function.zh: 统筹国家AI与数据战略，推动Vision 2030中的AI转型。
function.en: Coordinates national AI and data strategy, driving AI transformation in Vision 2030.

function.zh: 吸引外国投资，管理公共投资基金（PIF）投资组合。
function.en: Attracts foreign investment, manages the Public Investment Fund (PIF) portfolio.

function.zh: 管理武装力量，MBS曾任国防部长，推动军事现代化。
function.en: Manages armed forces, MBS formerly served as defense minister, driving military modernization.

function.zh: 管理石油产量（OPEC+协调）与能源转型政策。
function.en: Manages oil production (OPEC+ coordination) and energy transition policy.

localAdmin.zh: 13个省由国王任命的省长管理（多为王室成员），市镇级有限的地方选举机制。
localAdmin.en: 13 provinces managed by king-appointed governors (mostly royals), limited municipal-level election mechanisms.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法（沙里亚法）为基础的法律体系，刑法严厉，MBS推动部分司法现代化改革。
legalSystem.en: Legal system based on Sharia (Islamic law), severe criminal penalties, MBS advancing partial judicial modernization reforms.

taxationSystem.zh: 无个人所得税，增值税15%（2020年从5%上调），依赖石油收入为主，正推进经济多元化税基扩展。
taxationSystem.en: No personal income tax, VAT 15% (raised from 5% in 2020), primarily dependent on oil revenue, advancing economic diversification and tax base expansion.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派瓦哈比派为主），麦加与麦地那为伊斯兰两大圣城
religion.en: Islam (Sunni Wahhabi predominant), Mecca and Medina as Islam's two holiest cities

philosophy.zh: Vision 2030代表的现代化愿景与瓦哈比保守传统之间的张力，MBS推动社会自由化（影院、音乐会、女性驾车）。
philosophy.en: Tension between Vision 2030 modernization vision and Wahhabi conservative tradition, MBS advancing social liberalization (cinemas, concerts, women driving).

culturalAchievements.zh: 伊斯兰圣城遗产、NEOM未来城市项目、娱乐产业开放（F1大奖赛、电竞）、AlUla考古旅游。
culturalAchievements.en: Islamic holy city heritage, NEOM future city project, entertainment industry opening (F1, esports), AlUla archaeological tourism.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪米特语族（阿拉伯语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch (Arabic as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: G20经济体，石油仍占出口70%以上，Vision 2030推动经济多元化：旅游、娱乐、科技、金融中心建设。
gdpDescription.en: G20 economy, oil still over 70% of exports, Vision 2030 driving economic diversification: tourism, entertainment, tech, financial center development.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（Aramco）、石化、金融、旅游、娱乐、建筑（NEOM/吉达塔）、军事工业
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (Aramco), petrochemicals, finance, tourism, entertainment, construction (NEOM/Jeddah Tower), military industry

tradeGoods.zh: 原油与天然气、石化产品、塑料、矿产品
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil and natural gas, petrochemical products, plastics, mineral products

householdWealth.zh: 公民享受免税收入与政府补贴，但财富高度集中于王室与商业精英，外籍劳工生活条件差距巨大。
householdWealth.en: Citizens enjoy tax-free income and government subsidies, but wealth highly concentrated in royalty and business elite, vast living condition gap for foreign workers.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大原油出口目的地，美国、印度、日韩为重要贸易伙伴，OPEC+主导全球油价。
tradeRoutes.en: China as largest crude oil export destination, US, India, Japan, Korea as important trade partners, OPEC+ dominates global oil prices.

economicSystem.zh: 以石油经济为基础的国家资本主义，公共投资基金（PIF）管理约7000亿美元资产，推动多元化投资。
economicSystem.en: State capitalism based on oil economy, Public Investment Fund (PIF) manages approximately $700 billion in assets, driving diversified investment.

treasuryDescription.zh: 央行外汇储备约4400亿美元，PIF资产约7000亿美元，Aramco估值约2万亿美元。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank foreign reserves approximately $440 billion, PIF assets approximately $700 billion, Aramco valued at approximately $2 trillion.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的25%，财政状况总体健康但Vision 2030大型项目支出巨大。
debtLevel.en: Government debt approximately 25% of GDP, fiscal health overall sound but Vision 2030 mega-project spending is enormous.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 石油减产支撑油价但牺牲产量收入，非石油收入增长目标推进中，Vision 2030超级项目持续投入。
fiscalPolicy.en: Oil production cuts support prices but sacrifice production revenue, non-oil revenue growth targets advancing, Vision 2030 mega-projects with continued investment.

description.zh: 装备先进西方武器但实战经验有限，也门战争暴露战斗力不足。
description.en: Equipped with advanced Western weapons but limited combat experience, Yemen war exposed combat effectiveness gaps.

description.zh: 装备F-15SA与台风战斗机，中东最大空军之一。
description.en: Equipped with F-15SA and Typhoon fighters, one of the largest air forces in the Middle East.

description.zh: 独立于国防部的部落武装力量，负责王室保卫与内部安全。
description.en: Tribal force independent of the defense ministry, responsible for royal protection and internal security.

technology.zh: 以美国武器系统为主（F-15、爱国者导弹），采购中国无人机，国防工业化目标50%本地化。
technology.en: Primarily US weapons systems (F-15, Patriot missiles), procuring Chinese drones, defense industrialization targeting 50% localization.

threats.zh: 伊朗地区扩张、也门胡塞武装、恐怖主义威胁、以色列-巴勒斯坦冲突外溢。
threats.en: Iranian regional expansion, Yemen Houthi rebels, terrorism threats, Israel-Palestine conflict spillover.

recentBattles.zh: 也门战争干预持续但寻求退出（2023年沙特-伊朗复交），胡塞无人机与导弹袭击威胁。
recentBattles.en: Yemen war intervention continuing but seeking exit (2023 Saudi-Iran rapprochement), Houthi drone and missile attack threats.

populationDescription.zh: 人口年轻（约70%在35岁以下），外籍劳工约占总人口38%，沙特化政策推动本国人就业。
populationDescription.en: Young population (~70% under 35), foreign workers approximately 38% of total population, Saudization policy promoting citizen employment.

ethnicGroups.zh: 阿拉伯人为主体，大量南亚、东南亚与非洲外籍劳工
ethnicGroups.en: Arab majority, large South Asian, Southeast Asian, and African foreign worker populations

socialClasses.zh: 王室与商业精英、政府公务员中产阶级、普通沙特公民、外籍劳工（权利有限），阶层间流动性增加。
socialClasses.en: Royal and business elite, government employee middle class, ordinary Saudi citizens, foreign workers (limited rights), increasing inter-class mobility.

allies.zh: 美国（传统安全盟友但关系复杂化）、中国（最大石油客户）、海合会成员国。
allies.en: United States (traditional security ally but relationship complicating), China (largest oil customer), GCC member states.

enemies.zh: 与伊朗2023年复交但深层矛盾未消，也门胡塞武装仍为安全威胁。
enemies.en: Rapprochement with Iran in 2023 but deep contradictions remain, Yemen Houthi rebels still a security threat.

treaties.zh: 海合会、OPEC+、G20、伊斯兰合作组织。
treaties.en: GCC, OPEC+, G20, Organisation of Islamic Cooperation.

foreignPolicy.zh: MBS推行独立外交：与中国伊朗同时深化关系、寻求以色列正常化（因加沙战争暂停）、减少对美依赖。
foreignPolicy.en: MBS pursuing independent diplomacy: deepening ties with China and Iran simultaneously, seeking Israel normalization (paused due to Gaza war), reducing US dependence.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年3月中国斡旋下与伊朗复交，以色列正常化谈判因October 7战争中断，加入金砖国家。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Rapprochement with Iran brokered by China in March 2023, Israel normalization talks interrupted by October 7 war, joined BRICS.

era.zh: Vision 2030数字化转型与智慧城市建设期
era.en: Vision 2030 digital transformation and smart city construction era

keyInnovations.zh: NEOM智慧城市（The Line线性城市）、石油化工技术、海水淡化、可再生能源（太阳能）。
keyInnovations.en: NEOM smart city (The Line linear city), petrochemical technology, desalination, renewable energy (solar).

infrastructure.zh: 大规模基础设施投资进行中，5G网络覆盖快速扩展，NEOM与Red Sea项目为超级工程。
infrastructure.en: Massive infrastructure investment ongoing, 5G network coverage rapidly expanding, NEOM and Red Sea projects as mega-engineering.

policy.zh: SDAIA（沙特数据与AI管理局）统筹国家AI战略，AI列为Vision 2030核心支柱，目标2030年AI贡献GDP 12%。
policy.en: SDAIA coordinates national AI strategy, AI listed as a Vision 2030 core pillar, targeting AI to contribute 12% of GDP by 2030.

regulatoryStance.zh: 政府主导的AI推进模式，监管框架建设中，个人数据保护法已实施，AI伦理指南制定中。
regulatoryStance.en: Government-led AI promotion model, regulatory framework under construction, personal data protection law implemented, AI ethics guidelines in development.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资承诺超200亿美元，PIF投资AI基金与基础设施，利雅得吸引国际科技公司设立AI中心。
investmentScale.en: AI investment commitment exceeding $20 billion, PIF investing in AI funds and infrastructure, Riyadh attracting international tech companies to establish AI centers.

valuation.zh: 政府机构（管理超百亿美元AI预算）
valuation.en: Government agency (managing over $10 billion AI budget)

keyProducts.zh: 国家AI平台、数据治理框架、Tawakkalna健康应用
keyProducts.en: National AI platform, data governance framework, Tawakkalna health app

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的电信服务、云计算、网络安全
keyProducts.en: AI-driven telecom services, cloud computing, cybersecurity

contribution.zh: 领导沙特国家AI战略实施，组织全球AI峰会（GAIN）。
contribution.en: Leading Saudi national AI strategy implementation, organizing the Global AI Summit (GAIN).

researchFocus.zh: 阿拉伯语NLP、石油勘探AI、智慧城市AI、医疗AI。
researchFocus.en: Arabic NLP, oil exploration AI, smart city AI, medical AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 大规模数据中心建设中，与Google Cloud和Oracle Cloud合作，NEOM计划建设AI专用计算中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: Large-scale data center construction underway, partnerships with Google Cloud and Oracle Cloud, NEOM plans to build AI-dedicated compute center.

talentPool.zh: 本土AI人才严重不足，通过高薪吸引国际人才、海外留学生培养和与国际大学合作弥补。
talentPool.en: Severe local AI talent shortage, compensating through high salaries to attract international talent, overseas student training, and partnerships with international universities.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约25-30位，中东地区与UAE并列领先。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 25-30th globally in AI, co-leading in the Middle East with the UAE.

outlook.zh: 财力雄厚但人才与生态不足，能否将石油财富转化为AI能力是Vision 2030成败关键。
outlook.en: Financially powerful but talent and ecosystem insufficient, whether oil wealth can be converted into AI capability is key to Vision 2030's success.

strengths.zh: 巨额石油财富与主权基金、年轻人口、MBS强力推动改革的政治意志、地理位置（亚欧非枢纽）。
strengths.en: Enormous oil wealth and sovereign funds, young population, MBS's strong political will to drive reform, geographic position (Asia-Europe-Africa hub).

weaknesses.zh: 人权记录（卡舒吉事件）、对石油依赖仍高、本土科技人才不足、威权统治风险、社会保守主义阻力。
weaknesses.en: Human rights record (Khashoggi case), still high oil dependence, insufficient local tech talent, authoritarian governance risk, social conservatism resistance.

outlook.zh: Vision 2030正在重塑沙特经济与社会，AI投资规模宏大但执行能力是关键挑战，与中美同时合作的平衡外交面临考验。
outlook.en: Vision 2030 is reshaping Saudi economy and society, AI investment scale is grand but execution capability is the key challenge, balanced diplomacy of engaging both China and US faces tests.

description.zh: 2023年11月，沙特阿拉伯在王储MBS推动下加速Vision 2030转型。SDAIA统筹超200亿美元AI投资承诺，目标2030年AI贡献GDP 12%。NEOM智慧城市项目（含The Line线性城市）是全球最大AI应用场景之一。3月中国斡旋下与伊朗复交，加入金砖国家，以色列正常化因加沙战争中断。PIF（7000亿美元）是全球最活跃的AI投资主权基金之一。
description.en: In November 2023, Saudi Arabia under Crown Prince MBS accelerates Vision 2030 transformation. SDAIA coordinates over $20 billion in AI investment commitments, targeting AI to contribute 12% of GDP by 2030. The NEOM smart city project (including The Line) is one of the world's largest AI application scenarios. China-brokered rapprochement with Iran in March, joined BRICS, Israel normalization interrupted by Gaza war. PIF ($700 billion) is one of the world's most active sovereign funds for AI investment.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦制君主国，由7个酋长国组成，最高委员会由7位酋长组成，总统由阿布扎比酋长世袭担任。
governmentForm.en: Federal monarchy comprising 7 emirates, Supreme Council of 7 rulers, presidency hereditary to the Abu Dhabi ruler.

socialStructure.zh: 本国公民仅占人口约11%但享受丰厚福利，外籍劳工占近90%但权利有限，科技精英阶层快速崛起。
socialStructure.en: Citizens comprise only ~11% of population but enjoy generous welfare, foreign workers nearly 90% with limited rights, tech elite class rapidly rising.

rulingClass.zh: MBZ集权统治，阿布扎比纳哈扬家族与迪拜马克图姆家族为两大权力中心。
rulingClass.en: MBZ centralized rule, Abu Dhabi's Al Nahyan and Dubai's Al Maktoum families as the two power centers.

succession.zh: 各酋长国世袭统治，联邦总统由阿布扎比酋长担任，副总统兼总理由迪拜酋长担任。
succession.en: Each emirate under hereditary rule, federal president from Abu Dhabi's ruler, vice president and PM from Dubai's ruler.

structure.zh: 联邦最高委员会为最高权力机构，联邦国民议会（40席，半数选举半数任命）为咨询机构。
structure.en: Federal Supreme Council as highest authority, Federal National Council (40 seats, half elected half appointed) as advisory body.

function.zh: 全球首个AI部（2017年设立），推动国家AI战略与政府AI应用。
function.en: World's first Ministry of AI (established 2017), advancing national AI strategy and government AI applications.

function.zh: 推动经济多元化、外商投资与贸易发展。
function.en: Promotes economic diversification, foreign investment, and trade development.

function.zh: 管理联合武装力量与军事采购。
function.en: Manages the union defense force and military procurement.

localAdmin.zh: 7个酋长国各有独立的地方政府与法律体系，阿布扎比与迪拜为最主要的两个酋长国。
localAdmin.en: Each of 7 emirates has independent local government and legal systems, Abu Dhabi and Dubai as the two primary emirates.

legalSystem.zh: 混合法律体系（伊斯兰教法、民法与普通法），自由贸易区有独立法律体系（如DIFC普通法）。
legalSystem.en: Mixed legal system (Sharia, civil, and common law), free trade zones have independent legal systems (e.g., DIFC common law).

taxationSystem.zh: 无个人所得税，2023年起征收9%公司税，增值税5%，免税经济模式吸引国际企业。
taxationSystem.en: No personal income tax, 9% corporate tax introduced from 2023, 5% VAT, tax-free economic model attracting international businesses.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为国教（约76%），但宗教宽容度在中东最高，外籍人口多元信仰
religion.en: Islam as state religion (~76%), but highest religious tolerance in the Middle East, diverse faiths among foreign population

philosophy.zh: 宽容与现代化为官方话语，'包容之年''可持续发展之年'等主题年反映政策方向，实用主义与全球化取向。
philosophy.en: Tolerance and modernization as official discourse, themed years like 'Year of Tolerance' and 'Year of Sustainability' reflect policy direction, pragmatism and globalization orientation.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母（阿拉伯语），英语广泛使用

culturalAchievements.zh: 卢浮宫阿布扎比、迪拜世博会遗产、2023年COP28气候大会主办、F1阿布扎比大奖赛。
culturalAchievements.en: Louvre Abu Dhabi, Dubai Expo legacy, hosting COP28 climate conference in 2023, Abu Dhabi F1 Grand Prix.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪米特语族（阿拉伯语为官方语言，英语为商务通用语言）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch (Arabic official, English as business lingua franca)

gdpDescription.zh: 中东最多元化经济体，非石油部门占GDP约70%（迪拜更高），全球物流枢纽、旅游与金融中心。
gdpDescription.en: Most diversified Middle East economy, non-oil sector approximately 70% of GDP (higher in Dubai), global logistics hub, tourism and financial center.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、物流（迪拜港口）、旅游、金融（DIFC/ADGM）、房地产、AI与科技、航空（阿联酋航空）
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, logistics (Dubai ports), tourism, finance (DIFC/ADGM), real estate, AI and tech, aviation (Emirates airline)

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、天然气、铝、再出口贸易（迪拜作为全球中转站）、黄金
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, natural gas, aluminum, re-export trade (Dubai as global transit hub), gold

householdWealth.zh: 公民享受免税收入与政府福利，迪拜为全球高净值人士聚集地，外籍劳工收入差异极大。
householdWealth.en: Citizens enjoy tax-free income and government welfare, Dubai as a global hub for high-net-worth individuals, vast income disparities among foreign workers.

tradeRoutes.zh: 全球物流枢纽（杰贝阿里港），与中国、印度、欧盟、美国均有大规模贸易，迪拜为亚欧非贸易中转站。
tradeRoutes.en: Global logistics hub (Jebel Ali Port), large-scale trade with China, India, EU, US, Dubai as Asia-Europe-Africa trade transit hub.

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济为基础，政府通过主权基金（ADIA、Mubadala）投资全球资产，自由贸易区提供特殊经济政策。
economicSystem.en: Free market economy as foundation, government invests in global assets through sovereign funds (ADIA, Mubadala), free trade zones provide special economic policies.

unit.zh: 美元等值主权财富基金（ADIA为主）
unit.en: US dollar equivalent sovereign wealth funds (primarily ADIA)

treasuryDescription.zh: ADIA（约7000亿美元）为全球最大主权基金之一，Mubadala（约2800亿美元）是科技投资重要平台。
treasuryDescription.en: ADIA (~$700 billion) is one of the world's largest sovereign funds, Mubadala (~$280 billion) is an important tech investment platform.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的30%，财政状况总体健康，迪拜2009年债务危机后加强财政纪律。
debtLevel.en: Government debt approximately 30% of GDP, overall fiscal health sound, Dubai strengthened fiscal discipline after 2009 debt crisis.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 2023年公司税引入标志财政多元化，科技与AI投资为战略优先，COP28彰显气候议题领导力。
fiscalPolicy.en: 2023 corporate tax introduction marks fiscal diversification, tech and AI investment as strategic priority, COP28 showcasing climate leadership.

description.zh: 小而精的职业化陆军，在也门与利比亚有作战经验。
description.en: Small but professional army, with combat experience in Yemen and Libya.

description.zh: 装备F-16E/F Block 60与幻影2000战斗机，采购中国翼龙无人机。
description.en: Equipped with F-16E/F Block 60 and Mirage 2000 fighters, procuring Chinese Wing Loong drones.

description.zh: 精锐部队，装备最先进武器，负责国家元首保卫与特种作战。
description.en: Elite force with the most advanced weapons, responsible for head of state protection and special operations.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德

technology.zh: 先进西方与中国武器系统混合装备，EDGE国防集团开发本土AI军事技术，无人机能力突出。
technology.en: Mixed advanced Western and Chinese weapons systems, EDGE defense group developing local AI military technology, outstanding drone capability.

threats.zh: 伊朗核与导弹威胁、也门胡塞武装、地区不稳定、网络安全威胁。
threats.en: Iranian nuclear and missile threat, Yemen Houthis, regional instability, cybersecurity threats.

recentBattles.zh: 已从也门战争中撤出多数作战部队，聚焦网络战与无人机能力建设。
recentBattles.en: Withdrawn most combat forces from Yemen war, focusing on cyber warfare and drone capability building.

populationDescription.zh: 外籍人口约占89%，本国公民约110万，全球最国际化国家之一，人口结构以青壮年劳动力为主。
populationDescription.en: Foreign population approximately 89%, citizens approximately 1.1 million, one of the world's most internationalized nations, population structure dominated by working-age adults.

ethnicGroups.zh: 阿联酋公民（约11%）、南亚裔（约59%）、其他阿拉伯人（约10%）、东南亚裔、西方侨民
ethnicGroups.en: UAE citizens (~11%), South Asian (~59%), other Arab (~10%), Southeast Asian, Western expatriates

socialClasses.zh: 公民享受丰厚福利（住房补贴、免费教育医疗），外籍白领与蓝领劳工间差距巨大。
socialClasses.en: Citizens enjoy generous welfare (housing subsidies, free education and healthcare), vast gap between white-collar and blue-collar foreign workers.

allies.zh: 美国（最大军售来源）、法国、印度、以色列（亚伯拉罕协议）、海合会成员国。
allies.en: United States (largest arms supplier), France, India, Israel (Abraham Accords), GCC member states.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与伊朗关系仍紧张（领土争端：三岛问题），与卡塔尔关系缓和。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but tensions with Iran persist (territorial dispute: three islands issue), relations with Qatar eased.

treaties.zh: 亚伯拉罕协议、海合会、联合国、COP28主办国。
treaties.en: Abraham Accords, GCC, United Nations, COP28 host country.

foreignPolicy.zh: MBZ推行多元外交，同时维护与美国、中国、印度、以色列的关系，COP28提升全球影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: MBZ pursues diversified diplomacy, simultaneously maintaining relations with US, China, India, Israel, COP28 enhancing global influence.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年11-12月主办COP28气候大会，首次在化石燃料文本上达成'转型脱离'共识。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Hosted COP28 climate conference in November-December 2023, achieving first-ever consensus on 'transitioning away from' fossil fuels.

era.en: Global AI and smart city frontier

keyInnovations.zh: Falcon大语言模型（开源180B参数）、EDGE国防AI、智慧城市应用、太空技术（Hope火星探测器）。
keyInnovations.en: Falcon LLM (open-source 180B parameters), EDGE defense AI, smart city applications, space technology (Hope Mars probe).

infrastructure.zh: 全球领先数字基础设施，5G覆盖率极高，大规模数据中心，智慧城市应用广泛部署。
infrastructure.en: World-leading digital infrastructure, extremely high 5G coverage, large-scale data centers, smart city applications widely deployed.

policy.zh: 全球首个设AI部长（奥马尔·苏丹·奥拉玛，2017年任命）的国家，国家AI战略2031目标建设全球AI枢纽。
policy.en: World's first country with an AI minister (Omar Sultan Al Olama, appointed 2017), National AI Strategy 2031 targeting a global AI hub.

regulatoryStance.zh: 创新友好型监管，AI自由区（ADGM）提供实验性监管环境，数据跨境流动政策灵活。
regulatoryStance.en: Innovation-friendly regulation, AI free zone (ADGM) provides experimental regulatory environment, flexible cross-border data flow policies.

investmentScale.zh: Mubadala投资数十亿美元于AI领域，G42获微软15亿美元投资，AI投资总规模快速增长。
investmentScale.en: Mubadala investing billions in AI, G42 received $1.5 billion Microsoft investment, total AI investment scale growing rapidly.

capabilities.zh: 阿拉伯世界最大开源大语言模型（1800亿参数），Hugging Face排行榜曾居首位。
capabilities.en: Largest open-source LLM from the Arab world (180 billion parameters), topped the Hugging Face leaderboard.

keyProducts.zh: AI基础设施、云计算、医疗AI、智慧城市解决方案
keyProducts.en: AI infrastructure, cloud computing, medical AI, smart city solutions

keyProducts.zh: Falcon系列开源大语言模型、量子计算研究、自主系统
keyProducts.en: Falcon series open-source LLMs, quantum computing research, autonomous systems

contribution.zh: 全球首位AI部长，推动UAE成为全球AI治理与发展的先行者。
contribution.en: World's first AI minister, driving the UAE to become a pioneer in global AI governance and development.

researchFocus.zh: 大语言模型（Falcon）、阿拉伯语NLP、智慧城市AI、医疗AI、自主系统。
researchFocus.en: Large language models (Falcon), Arabic NLP, smart city AI, medical AI, autonomous systems.

computeInfrastructure.zh: G42与TII拥有大规模GPU集群，Microsoft Azure与AWS在UAE设有数据中心区域，5G+边缘计算基础设施先进。
computeInfrastructure.en: G42 and TII have large-scale GPU clusters, Microsoft Azure and AWS have data center regions in UAE, advanced 5G + edge computing infrastructure.

talentPool.zh: 通过高薪与优质生活条件吸引全球AI人才，Mohamed bin Zayed University of AI为专门AI大学，本土人才仍不足。
talentPool.en: Attracting global AI talent through high salaries and quality living conditions, MBZUAI as a dedicated AI university, local talent still insufficient.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约20-25位，阿拉伯世界AI领导者，人均AI能力突出。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 20-25th globally in AI, Arab world AI leader, outstanding per-capita AI capability.

outlook.zh: Falcon模型证明阿拉伯世界可以开发世界级AI，G42与微软合作深化国际连接，COP28提升全球科技影响力。
outlook.en: Falcon model proves the Arab world can develop world-class AI, G42-Microsoft partnership deepens international connections, COP28 enhances global tech influence.

strengths.zh: Falcon开源模型、全球首个AI部长、G42+TII研发实力、庞大主权财富基金、全球化程度极高。
strengths.en: Falcon open-source model, world's first AI minister, G42+TII R&D strength, massive sovereign wealth funds, extremely high globalization.

weaknesses.zh: 本土人口与人才极少、地缘政治风险、劳工权利争议、威权统治、对外籍人才高度依赖。
weaknesses.en: Very small native population and talent pool, geopolitical risk, labor rights controversies, authoritarian governance, high dependence on foreign talent.

outlook.zh: 阿拉伯世界最先进的AI生态，Falcon与G42展示硬实力，但规模与人才可持续性是长期挑战。
outlook.en: Most advanced AI ecosystem in the Arab world, Falcon and G42 demonstrate hard power, but scale and talent sustainability are long-term challenges.

description.zh: 2023年11月，阿联酋以全球AI领导者姿态主办COP28气候大会。作为全球首个设立AI部长（奥马尔·苏丹·奥拉玛）的国家，UAE的TII发布了Falcon 180B——阿拉伯世界首个世界级开源大语言模型。G42获微软15亿美元投资成为AI基础设施巨头。Mubadala主权基金持续注资AI领域。MBZ推行的务实多元外交使UAE同时与美国、中国、以色列保持密切关系。
description.en: In November 2023, the UAE hosts COP28 as a global AI leader. As the world's first country with an AI minister (Omar Sultan Al Olama), UAE's TII released Falcon 180B — the Arab world's first world-class open-source LLM. G42 received $1.5 billion Microsoft investment to become an AI infrastructure giant. Mubadala sovereign fund continues investing in AI. MBZ's pragmatic diversified diplomacy maintains close ties simultaneously with the US, China, and Israel.

dynasty.zh: 人民行动党执政期（1959年至今）

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，一院制国会，总统为名义国家元首，人民行动党长期执政。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic, unicameral Parliament, president as nominal head of state, People's Action Party in long-term power.

socialStructure.zh: 高度精英主义的多元族群社会，华人、马来人、印度人和谐共处，教育与技能决定社会阶层。
socialStructure.en: Highly meritocratic multi-ethnic society, harmonious coexistence of Chinese, Malay, and Indian communities, education and skills determining social class.

rulingClass.zh: 人民行动党技术官僚精英，李光耀创建的高效治理体系延续，即将向第四代领导层交接。
rulingClass.en: PAP technocratic elite, Lee Kuan Yew's efficient governance system continuing, approaching transition to fourth-generation leadership.

succession.zh: 总理由执政党在国会选举后推选，李显龙计划2024年交班给黄循财（Lawrence Wong）。
succession.en: PM selected by the ruling party after parliamentary elections, Lee Hsien Loong plans to hand over to Lawrence Wong in 2024.

structure.zh: 一院制国会（93席），人民行动党占绝大多数席位，内阁由总理领导，高效技术官僚治理。
structure.en: Unicameral Parliament (93 seats), PAP holds overwhelming majority, cabinet led by PM, efficient technocratic governance.

name.zh: 智慧国与数字政府办公室（SNDGO）
name.en: Smart Nation and Digital Government Office (SNDGO)

function.zh: 统筹智慧国战略、数字政府建设与AI政策协调。
function.en: Coordinates Smart Nation strategy, digital government construction, and AI policy coordination.

function.zh: 推动经济发展、产业政策与国际贸易。
function.en: Promotes economic development, industrial policy, and international trade.

function.zh: 管理新加坡武装力量与国家安全。
function.en: Manages the Singapore Armed Forces and national security.

function.zh: 管理媒体、数字经济与信息安全政策。
function.en: Manages media, digital economy, and information security policy.

localAdmin.zh: 城市国家无省级行政区划，由政府法定机构直接管理，社区发展理事会分管基层事务。
localAdmin.en: City-state with no provincial subdivisions, directly managed by government statutory boards, Community Development Councils handle grassroots affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法体系为基础，融合部分大陆法特征，严格执法传统，网络安全与数据保护法完善。
legalSystem.en: Common law based system with some civil law features, strict law enforcement tradition, comprehensive cybersecurity and data protection laws.

taxationSystem.zh: 公司税17%（较低）、个人所得税最高22%、GST 8%（2024年升至9%），低税负吸引国际企业。
taxationSystem.en: Corporate tax 17% (relatively low), top personal income tax 22%, GST 8% (rising to 9% in 2024), low tax burden attracting international businesses.

religion.zh: 佛教（约31%）、基督教（约19%）、伊斯兰（约15%）、道教（约9%）、印度教（约5%）、无宗教（约20%）
religion.en: Buddhism (~31%), Christianity (~19%), Islam (~15%), Taoism (~9%), Hinduism (~5%), non-religious (~20%)

philosophy.zh: 实用主义、精英主义与多元文化和谐，儒家治理传统与西方法治结合，科技乐观主义。
philosophy.en: Pragmatism, meritocracy, and multicultural harmony, Confucian governance tradition combined with Western rule of law, techno-optimism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语为工作语言）、汉字（华语）、爪夷字母（马来语）、泰米尔字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English as working language), Chinese characters (Mandarin), Jawi script (Malay), Tamil script

culturalAchievements.zh: 全球金融中心、滨海湾花园建筑奇迹、美食文化（小贩中心为UNESCO遗产）、多语言教育体系。
culturalAchievements.en: Global financial center, Gardens by the Bay architectural marvel, food culture (hawker centers as UNESCO heritage), multilingual education system.

languageFamily.zh: 多语言国家：英语（通用）、华语、马来语（国语）、泰米尔语
languageFamily.en: Multilingual nation: English (lingua franca), Mandarin, Malay (national language), Tamil

gdpDescription.zh: 全球人均GDP最高的经济体之一，以金融、科技、物流和生物医药为支柱的高度开放小型经济体。
gdpDescription.en: One of the highest per capita GDP economies globally, highly open small economy with finance, tech, logistics, and biomedical as pillars.

mainIndustries.zh: 金融服务、半导体制造、生物医药、石油炼化、数字经济/AI、物流（全球最繁忙港口）
mainIndustries.en: Financial services, semiconductor manufacturing, biopharmaceuticals, oil refining, digital economy/AI, logistics (world's busiest port)

tradeGoods.zh: 集成电路与电子产品、精炼石油、药品、金融服务、AI/IT服务
tradeGoods.en: Integrated circuits and electronics, refined petroleum, pharmaceuticals, financial services, AI/IT services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数全球前列，但住房成本高（政府组屋制度覆盖80%人口），外籍劳工收入差距大。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth among the world's highest, but high housing costs (government HDB system covers 80% of population), large income gaps for foreign workers.

tradeRoutes.zh: 全球最繁忙港口之一，东盟核心，与中国、美国、欧盟、马来西亚均有大规模贸易。
tradeRoutes.en: One of the world's busiest ports, ASEAN core, large-scale trade with China, US, EU, and Malaysia.

economicSystem.zh: 以自由市场经济为基础，政府通过淡马锡与GIC主权基金积极投资，产业政策精准引导。
economicSystem.en: Based on free market economy, government actively invests through Temasek and GIC sovereign funds, precisely guided industrial policy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 淡马锡（约3800亿美元）与GIC（估值超7000亿美元）合计为全球最大主权投资体系之一。
treasuryDescription.en: Temasek (~$380 billion) and GIC (estimated over $700 billion) combined form one of the world's largest sovereign investment systems.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的130%，但主要为国内发行的公积金投资债券，实际净资产为正。
debtLevel.en: Government debt approximately 130% of GDP, but primarily domestically issued CPF investment bonds, actual net assets positive.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政管理传统，通过投资回报补贴政府支出，GST上调扩大税基，Forward SG战略推进社会投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal management tradition, investment returns subsidize government spending, GST increase to broaden tax base, Forward SG strategy advancing social investment.

description.zh: 以全民兵役制为基础，装备先进，豹2主战坦克与AI辅助指挥系统。
description.en: Based on universal conscription, well-equipped with Leopard 2 MBTs and AI-assisted command systems.

description.zh: 装备F-15SG与F-16，已订购F-35B，东南亚最先进空军。
description.en: Equipped with F-15SG and F-16, F-35B on order, most advanced air force in Southeast Asia.

description.zh: 装备隐身护卫舰与潜艇，保卫马六甲海峡航线安全。
description.en: Equipped with stealth frigates and submarines, securing Malacca Strait shipping lanes.

technology.zh: 东南亚最先进军事技术，以色列与美国武器系统为主，国防科技局（DSTA）开发本土AI军事系统。
technology.en: Most advanced military technology in Southeast Asia, primarily Israeli and US weapons, Defence Science and Technology Agency (DSTA) developing local AI military systems.

threats.zh: 马六甲海峡安全、南海争端、恐怖主义、网络安全威胁。
threats.en: Malacca Strait security, South China Sea disputes, terrorism, cybersecurity threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期军事冲突。积极参与多边安全合作与联合军演。
recentBattles.en: No recent military conflicts. Active participation in multilateral security cooperation and joint exercises.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约590万（含非居民约170万），老龄化速度亚洲最快之一，低生育率（约1.05）。
populationDescription.en: Total population approximately 5.9 million (including ~1.7 million non-residents), one of Asia's fastest aging rates, low fertility (~1.05).

ethnicGroups.zh: 华人（约74%）、马来人（约13%）、印度人（约9%）、其他（约4%）

socialClasses.zh: 高度精英主义社会，金融与科技专业人士为高收入群体，政府组屋制度保障基本住房。
socialClasses.en: Highly meritocratic society, finance and tech professionals as high-income group, government HDB system ensures basic housing.

allies.zh: 美国（安全合作）、中国（经贸）、东盟成员国、日本、澳大利亚、印度。
allies.en: United States (security cooperation), China (economic trade), ASEAN members, Japan, Australia, India.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，在中美竞争中维持平衡外交。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, maintaining balanced diplomacy amid US-China competition.

treaties.zh: 东盟、RCEP、CPTPP、五国联防（FPDA）、多个双边自贸协定。
treaties.en: ASEAN, RCEP, CPTPP, Five Power Defence Arrangements (FPDA), numerous bilateral FTAs.

foreignPolicy.zh: 基于小国生存的务实多边外交，在中美之间维持战略平衡，推动东盟团结与开放贸易体系。
foreignPolicy.en: Pragmatic multilateral diplomacy based on small-state survival, maintaining strategic balance between US and China, promoting ASEAN unity and open trade system.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年东盟轮值主席国（印尼）期间积极参与区域议题，李显龙访华访美维持等距外交。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Active participation in regional issues during 2023 ASEAN chairmanship (Indonesia), Lee visited China and US maintaining equidistant diplomacy.

era.zh: 智慧国与全球数字枢纽
era.en: Smart Nation and global digital hub

keyInnovations.zh: Smart Nation数字政府平台、SEA-LION东南亚语言模型、GovTech数字公共服务、半导体制造。
keyInnovations.en: Smart Nation digital government platform, SEA-LION Southeast Asian language model, GovTech digital public services, semiconductor manufacturing.

infrastructure.zh: 全球最先进的数字基础设施之一，100%光纤覆盖，5G全国部署，海底光缆枢纽。
infrastructure.en: One of the world's most advanced digital infrastructure, 100% fiber coverage, nationwide 5G deployment, submarine cable hub.

policy.zh: 国家AI战略2.0（2023年更新），AI Singapore（AISG）统筹研究与产业化，GovTech推动政府AI应用。
policy.en: National AI Strategy 2.0 (updated 2023), AI Singapore (AISG) coordinates research and industrialization, GovTech driving government AI adoption.

regulatoryStance.zh: 全球领先的AI治理框架：AI Verify测试工具、Model AI Governance Framework、个人数据保护法（PDPA）。
regulatoryStance.en: World-leading AI governance framework: AI Verify testing tool, Model AI Governance Framework, Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

investmentScale.zh: 政府5年投入5亿新元支持国家AI计划，私营部门AI投资快速增长，全球AI公司东南亚总部聚集地。
investmentScale.en: Government investing SGD 500 million over five years for national AI plan, private sector AI investment growing rapidly, Southeast Asia headquarters hub for global AI companies.

capabilities.zh: 东南亚多语言大语言模型，支持英语、中文、马来语、泰语等11种语言。
capabilities.en: Southeast Asian multilingual LLM supporting English, Chinese, Malay, Thai, and 11 other languages.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的东南亚超级应用（出行、配送、金融）
keyProducts.en: AI-driven Southeast Asian super-app (mobility, delivery, finance)

keyProducts.zh: Shopee电商AI推荐、Garena游戏AI、SeaMoney金融
keyProducts.en: Shopee e-commerce AI recommendations, Garena gaming AI, SeaMoney finance

affiliation.zh: AI Singapore / 新加坡国立大学
affiliation.en: AI Singapore / National University of Singapore

contribution.zh: 领导AI Singapore推动国家AI研究、人才培养与产业化，发布SEA-LION模型。
contribution.en: Led AI Singapore in advancing national AI research, talent development, and industrialization, released SEA-LION model.

researchFocus.zh: 东南亚多语言NLP、可信AI治理、金融AI、智慧城市AI、医疗AI。
researchFocus.en: Southeast Asian multilingual NLP, trustworthy AI governance, financial AI, smart city AI, medical AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: NSCC（国家超级计算中心）提供高性能计算，多家全球云服务商在新设数据中心，AI Singapore有专用GPU集群。
computeInfrastructure.en: NSCC (National Supercomputing Centre) provides HPC, multiple global cloud providers with data centers in Singapore, AI Singapore has dedicated GPU clusters.

talentPool.zh: NUS与NTU为顶级AI研究基地，吸引全球AI人才定居，AI Singapore培养本土AI工程师。
talentPool.en: NUS and NTU as top AI research bases, attracting global AI talent to settle, AI Singapore training local AI engineers.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约第8-10位，东南亚绝对领先，AI治理框架全球标杆。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 8-10th globally in AI, absolute leader in Southeast Asia, AI governance framework as a global benchmark.

outlook.zh: AI治理与可信AI领域的全球领导者角色巩固，SEA-LION填补东南亚语言AI空白，李显龙交班不影响AI战略连续性。
outlook.en: Consolidating global leadership role in AI governance and trustworthy AI, SEA-LION fills Southeast Asian language AI gap, Lee's succession won't affect AI strategy continuity.

strengths.zh: 全球领先AI治理框架、高效政府执行力、顶级教育体系（NUS/NTU）、东南亚枢纽地位、Grab/Sea等科技巨头。
strengths.en: World-leading AI governance framework, efficient government execution, top education system (NUS/NTU), Southeast Asian hub status, tech giants like Grab/Sea.

weaknesses.zh: 国土与人口极小、老龄化加速、对外部人才与贸易高度依赖、言论自由受限。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small territory and population, accelerating aging, high dependence on external talent and trade, limited freedom of expression.

outlook.zh: AI治理全球标杆地位巩固，东南亚AI枢纽角色不可替代，领导层交接平稳可期。
outlook.en: AI governance global benchmark status consolidated, irreplaceable Southeast Asian AI hub role, smooth leadership transition expected.

description.zh: 2023年11月，新加坡在李显龙总理领导下作为东南亚AI枢纽地位愈加巩固。AI Singapore发布了东南亚首个多语言大模型SEA-LION，AI治理框架（AI Verify）成为全球参考标准。Grab与Sea Limited为区域科技巨头。国家AI战略2.0聚焦可信AI与产业应用。100%城市化的智慧国家在数字政府、金融科技和教育方面全球领先。即将到来的领导层交接（李显龙→黄循财）不影响AI战略连续性。
description.en: In November 2023, Singapore under PM Lee consolidates its position as Southeast Asia's AI hub. AI Singapore released SEA-LION, Southeast Asia's first multilingual LLM, and the AI governance framework (AI Verify) became a global reference standard. Grab and Sea Limited are regional tech giants. National AI Strategy 2.0 focuses on trustworthy AI and industrial applications. The 100% urbanized Smart Nation leads globally in digital government, fintech, and education. The upcoming leadership transition (Lee → Lawrence Wong) won't affect AI strategy continuity.

governmentForm.zh: 一党制社会主义共和国，越南共产党领导，国家主席、总理与国会构成政府框架，'四驾马车'权力分配。
governmentForm.en: One-party socialist republic led by the Communist Party of Vietnam, state president, PM, and National Assembly form the government framework, 'four pillars' power distribution.

socialStructure.zh: 快速工业化推动城市中产阶级增长，农村人口仍占多数但迅速减少，贫富差距扩大但贫困率持续下降。
socialStructure.en: Rapid industrialization driving urban middle class growth, rural population still majority but rapidly declining, wealth gap widening but poverty rate continuously declining.

rulingClass.zh: 越共政治局为最高权力核心，阮富仲以反腐运动巩固权力，技术官僚在经济决策中角色增强。
rulingClass.en: CPV Politburo as supreme power center, Trọng consolidates power through anti-corruption campaign, technocrats' role in economic decision-making increasing.

succession.zh: 越共总书记由中央委员会选举产生，阮富仲已三任，健康状况引发继任讨论。
succession.en: CPV General Secretary elected by the Central Committee, Trọng serving third term, health condition sparking succession discussions.

structure.zh: 越共领导下的国会（500席）为最高国家权力机关，政府总理主持行政，四驾马车分权体制。
structure.en: CPV-led National Assembly (500 seats) as highest state authority, PM presides over administration, four-pillar power-sharing system.

function.zh: 管理电信、互联网、媒体与数字经济政策，推动数字化转型。
function.en: Manages telecommunications, internet, media, and digital economy policy, advancing digital transformation.

function.zh: 推动科技创新政策、研究资助与技术标准。
function.en: Promotes science and technology innovation policy, research funding, and technical standards.

function.zh: 管理工业发展、对外贸易与FDI政策。
function.en: Manages industrial development, foreign trade, and FDI policy.

function.zh: 管理人民军队与国家安全。
function.en: Manages the People's Army and national security.

localAdmin.zh: 58个省与5个直辖市，党委书记与人民委员会主席共同管理地方，中央集权色彩浓厚。
localAdmin.en: 58 provinces and 5 centrally-governed cities, party secretary and People's Committee chairman jointly manage localities, strong centralization.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系框架，越共领导下的社会主义法制，2013年宪法为基础，法治建设推进中但党对司法影响大。
legalSystem.en: Civil law framework, socialist legal system under CPV leadership, based on 2013 constitution, rule of law advancing but party influence on judiciary remains strong.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税（10%）与公司税（20%）为主，FDI企业享受税收优惠，出口导向税收政策。
taxationSystem.en: VAT (10%) and corporate tax (20%) as primary sources, FDI enterprises enjoy tax incentives, export-oriented tax policy.

religion.zh: 无宗教/民间信仰为主（约73%），佛教（约14%）、天主教（约7%）、高台教、和好教
religion.en: Non-religious/folk beliefs predominant (~73%), Buddhism (~14%), Catholicism (~7%), Cao Dai, Hoa Hao

philosophy.zh: 社会主义意识形态与儒家传统并存，市场经济实用主义兴起，民族主义强烈（南海主权意识）。
philosophy.en: Socialist ideology and Confucian tradition coexisting, market economy pragmatism rising, strong nationalism (South China Sea sovereignty consciousness).

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（越南语国语字）

culturalAchievements.zh: 世界遗产（下龙湾、会安古城）、越南美食全球化（Phở）、经济改革'Đổi Mới'成功范例。
culturalAchievements.en: World Heritage sites (Ha Long Bay, Hoi An), Vietnamese cuisine globalization (Phở), economic reform 'Đổi Mới' success model.

languageFamily.zh: 南亚语系越芒语族（越南语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Austroasiatic, Vietic branch (Vietnamese as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球增长最快的经济体之一，出口导向型制造业为核心，三星越南工厂出口占全国近30%。
gdpDescription.en: One of the world's fastest-growing economies, export-oriented manufacturing as core, Samsung Vietnam factories accounting for nearly 30% of national exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 电子制造（三星、英特尔）、纺织服装、水产品、农业、旅游、软件外包（FPT）
mainIndustries.en: Electronics manufacturing (Samsung, Intel), textiles and garments, aquatic products, agriculture, tourism, software outsourcing (FPT)

tradeGoods.zh: 智能手机与电子产品（三星代工）、纺织品、水产品、咖啡、大米、木制品
tradeGoods.en: Smartphones and electronics (Samsung contract manufacturing), textiles, aquatic products, coffee, rice, wood products

householdWealth.zh: 中产阶级快速扩大（约30%人口），城市消费升级明显，农村贫困仍存在但持续减少。
householdWealth.en: Middle class rapidly expanding (~30% of population), urban consumption upgrading notable, rural poverty still exists but continuously declining.

tradeRoutes.zh: 美国为最大出口目的地，中国为最大进口来源，与EU签有FTA（EVFTA），RCEP与CPTPP成员。
tradeRoutes.en: US as largest export destination, China as largest import source, FTA with EU (EVFTA), RCEP and CPTPP member.

economicSystem.zh: 社会主义导向的市场经济（Đổi Mới路线），国有企业与私营/外资企业共存，FDI对经济增长至关重要。
economicSystem.en: Socialist-oriented market economy (Đổi Mới path), state-owned enterprises coexisting with private/foreign enterprises, FDI crucial for economic growth.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约900亿美元，央行积极管理汇率稳定，FDI持续流入支撑储备增长。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $90 billion, central bank actively manages exchange rate stability, continued FDI inflows support reserve growth.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的37%，财政纪律较好，国际信用评级稳步上升。
debtLevel.en: Public debt approximately 37% of GDP, good fiscal discipline, international credit ratings steadily rising.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 稳健财政政策，优先基础设施投资（高铁、高速公路），FDI税收优惠吸引制造业转移。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal policy, prioritizing infrastructure investment (high-speed rail, highways), FDI tax incentives attracting manufacturing relocation.

description.zh: 人数众多，以俄罗斯武器为主，正推进现代化。
description.en: Large in number, primarily Russian weapons, modernizing in progress.

description.zh: 以南海防御为重点，装备俄制基洛级潜艇，海上民兵力量庞大。
description.en: South China Sea defense as priority, equipped with Russian Kilo-class submarines, large maritime militia force.

description.zh: 装备苏-30MK2战斗机，防空系统较强（S-300），正考虑西方军购多元化。
description.en: Equipped with Su-30MK2 fighters, strong air defense systems (S-300), considering Western procurement diversification.

commanderInChief.zh: 越共中央军事委员会主席阮富仲
commanderInChief.en: CPV Central Military Commission Chairman Nguyễn Phú Trọng

technology.zh: 以俄罗斯武器系统为主，正推进国防工业本土化与武器来源多元化（印度、以色列、韩国）。
technology.en: Primarily Russian weapons systems, advancing defense industry localization and weapons source diversification (India, Israel, South Korea).

threats.zh: 南海（东海）主权争端（与中国）、海上安全、网络安全。
threats.en: South China Sea sovereignty disputes (with China), maritime security, cybersecurity.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期军事冲突。南海定期发生与中国海警的海上对峙。
recentBattles.en: No recent military conflicts. Regular maritime standoffs with Chinese coast guard in the South China Sea.

populationDescription.zh: 东南亚第三人口大国，人口结构年轻（中位年龄31岁），城市化快速推进，人口红利窗口期。
populationDescription.en: Southeast Asia's third most populous nation, young population structure (median age 31), rapid urbanization, demographic dividend window.

ethnicGroups.zh: 京族（约86%）、岱族、泰族、芒族、华人等54个民族
ethnicGroups.en: Kinh (~86%), Tay, Thai, Muong, Hoa (Chinese), and 54 ethnic groups total

socialClasses.zh: 城市新中产快速增长，科技与外资企业员工收入提升，农村贫困持续减少但城乡差距扩大。
socialClasses.en: Urban new middle class growing rapidly, tech and foreign enterprise employee incomes rising, rural poverty continuously declining but urban-rural gap widening.

allies.zh: 全面战略伙伴：中国、俄罗斯、印度、韩国、日本。2023年升级对美关系为全面战略伙伴。
allies.en: Comprehensive strategic partners: China, Russia, India, South Korea, Japan. Upgraded US relations to comprehensive strategic partnership in 2023.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与中国在南海存在领土争端，通过外交与国际法途径应对。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but territorial disputes with China in the South China Sea, addressed through diplomacy and international law.

treaties.zh: 东盟、RCEP、CPTPP、EVFTA、多个双边全面战略伙伴关系。
treaties.en: ASEAN, RCEP, CPTPP, EVFTA, multiple bilateral comprehensive strategic partnerships.

foreignPolicy.zh: '竹子外交'：灵活多方位外交，在中美之间维持平衡，2023年同时升级与美国和中国的伙伴关系。
foreignPolicy.en: 'Bamboo diplomacy': flexible multi-directional diplomacy, maintaining balance between US and China, simultaneously upgrading partnerships with both in 2023.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年9月拜登访越将关系升级为全面战略伙伴关系，习近平12月访越进一步深化中越关系。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Biden's September 2023 visit upgraded relations to comprehensive strategic partnership, Xi Jinping's December visit further deepened China-Vietnam relations.

era.zh: 制造业升级与数字经济发展期
era.en: Manufacturing upgrade and digital economy development era

keyInnovations.zh: 三星/英特尔越南工厂、FPT软件外包与AI服务、VinFast电动汽车、移动支付生态。
keyInnovations.en: Samsung/Intel Vietnam factories, FPT software outsourcing and AI services, VinFast electric vehicles, mobile payment ecosystem.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施快速改善但仍落后于需求，高速公路网扩展中，4G覆盖广泛，5G试点推进。
infrastructure.en: Infrastructure rapidly improving but still behind demand, highway network expanding, widespread 4G coverage, 5G pilots advancing.

policy.zh: 2021年发布国家AI战略至2030年，目标跻身东盟AI领先国家，信息通信部统筹推进。
policy.en: Released National AI Strategy to 2030 in 2021, targeting a leading AI position in ASEAN, coordinated by the Ministry of Information and Communications.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管框架建设初期，网络安全法已实施（争议性数据本地化要求），AI专项法规尚未出台。
regulatoryStance.en: Early stage regulatory framework construction, cybersecurity law implemented (controversial data localization requirements), AI-specific regulations not yet issued.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资处于早期阶段，FPT与Vingroup为主要投资方，政府AI专项预算有限。
investmentScale.en: AI investment in early stages, FPT and Vingroup as main investors, limited government AI dedicated budget.

valuation.en: FPT Corporation market cap approximately $4 billion

keyProducts.zh: AI软件开发外包、FPT.AI对话式AI平台、企业数字化转型
keyProducts.en: AI software development outsourcing, FPT.AI conversational AI platform, enterprise digital transformation

keyProducts.zh: 计算机视觉AI研究、VinFast自动驾驶AI、智慧城市AI
keyProducts.en: Computer vision AI research, VinFast autonomous driving AI, smart city AI

contribution.zh: 在谷歌DeepMind工作后回越创立VinAI，在CVPR等顶会发表论文，提升越南AI研究国际影响力。
contribution.en: Founded VinAI after working at Google DeepMind, published papers at top venues like CVPR, raising Vietnam's international AI research profile.

researchFocus.zh: 计算机视觉、越南语NLP、制造业AI自动化、智慧城市。
researchFocus.en: Computer vision, Vietnamese NLP, manufacturing AI automation, smart cities.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施有限但快速增长，FPT与Viettel建设数据中心，依赖国际云服务。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited but rapidly growing compute infrastructure, FPT and Viettel building data centers, reliant on international cloud services.

talentPool.zh: 大量年轻IT工程师（约50万软件开发者），AI专业人才不足但增长快，VinAI与FPT为培养平台。
talentPool.en: Large young IT engineer pool (~500,000 software developers), insufficient AI specialists but growing fast, VinAI and FPT as training platforms.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约55-65位，东盟地区位列新加坡、泰国之后第三梯队。
globalRanking.en: Ranked approximately 55-65th globally in AI, third tier in ASEAN behind Singapore and Thailand.

outlook.zh: 制造业基础与年轻IT人才为AI发展提供潜力，'中国+1'供应链转移战略带来机遇，但基础研究与高端人才仍需加强。
outlook.en: Manufacturing base and young IT talent provide potential for AI development, 'China+1' supply chain shift strategy brings opportunities, but foundational research and high-end talent still need strengthening.

strengths.zh: 年轻人口红利、出口制造业竞争力、FPT/VinAI科技企业成长、'竹子外交'灵活性、FDI吸引力。
strengths.en: Young population dividend, export manufacturing competitiveness, FPT/VinAI tech company growth, 'bamboo diplomacy' flexibility, FDI attractiveness.

weaknesses.zh: 一党制治理局限、基础设施不足、AI高端人才短缺、知识产权保护薄弱、环境污染加剧。
weaknesses.en: One-party governance limitations, insufficient infrastructure, shortage of high-end AI talent, weak intellectual property protection, increasing environmental pollution.

outlook.zh: '中国+1'战略使越南成为全球供应链转移最大受益者之一，AI外包与制造业AI应用有巨大增长空间。
outlook.en: 'China+1' strategy makes Vietnam one of the biggest beneficiaries of global supply chain shift, AI outsourcing and manufacturing AI applications have enormous growth potential.

description.zh: 2023年11月，越南在阮富仲总书记领导下继续高速经济增长。'竹子外交'取得标志性成果：9月与美国升级为全面战略伙伴关系，12月习近平访越深化中越关系。三星越南工厂出口占全国近30%，FPT Software成为全球AI外包领军企业，VinAI在计算机视觉领域跻身国际前沿。国家AI战略2030目标跻身东盟AI领先国家。99万人口与年轻IT人才为AI产业提供庞大基础。
description.en: In November 2023, Vietnam under General Secretary Trọng continues high-speed economic growth. 'Bamboo diplomacy' achieves landmark results: upgraded to comprehensive strategic partnership with US in September, Xi Jinping's December visit deepens China-Vietnam ties. Samsung Vietnam exports nearly 30% of national total, FPT Software becomes a global AI outsourcing leader, VinAI reaches international frontiers in computer vision. National AI Strategy 2030 targets a leading AI position in ASEAN. 99 million population and young IT talent provide an enormous base for the AI industry.
